papers.title: A Hardware-Software Co-Design for Efficient Secure Containers.
papers.abstract: VM-level containers provide strong isolation by running each container with its own kernel in a VM. However, they rely on virtualization hardware designed for general-purpose VMs, causing non-negligible performance overhead compared to OS-level containers. This performance gap widens dramatically in nested virtualization scenarios, where secure containers run inside a VM.
papers.abstract_zh: VM 级容器通过在 VM 中运行具有自己内核的每个容器来提供强大的隔离。然而，它们依赖于为通用虚拟机设计的虚拟化硬件，与操作系统级容器相比，导致了不可忽略的性能开销。在安全容器在虚拟机内运行的嵌套虚拟化场景中，这种性能差距急剧扩大。

papers.title: A House United Within Itself: SLO-Awareness for On-Premises Containerized ML Inference Clusters via Faro.
papers.abstract: This paper tackles the challenge of running multiple ML inference jobs (models) under time-varying workloads, on a constrained on-premises production cluster. Our system Faro takes in latency Service Level Objectives (SLOs) for each job, auto-distills them into utility functions, "sloppifies" these utility functions to make them amenable to mathematical optimization, automatically predicts workload via probabilistic prediction, and dynamically makes implicit cross-job resource allocations, in order to satisfy cluster-wide objectives, e.g., total utility, fairness, and other hybrid variants. A major challenge Faro tackles is that using precise utilities and high-fidelity predictors, can be too slow (and in a sense too precise!) for the fast adaptation we require. Faro's solution is to "sloppify" (relax) its multiple design components to achieve fast adaptation without overly degrading solution quality. Faro is implemented in a stack consisting of Ray Serve running atop a Kubernetes cluster. Trace-driven cluster deployments show that Faro achieves 2.3×-23× lower SLO violations compared to state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文解决了在受限的本地生产集群上在时变工作负载下运行多个 ML 推理作业（模型）的挑战。我们的系统 Faro 接收每个作业的延迟服务级别目标 (SLO)，自动将它们提炼为效用函数，“简化”这些效用函数以使它们适合数学优化，通过概率预测自动预测工作负载，并动态进行隐式跨作业资源分配，以满足集群范围的目标，例如总效用、公平性和其他混合变体。 Faro 解决的一个主要挑战是，使用精确的实用程序和高保真度预测器对于我们所需的快速适应来说可能太慢（并且在某种意义上太精确！）。 Faro 的解决方案是“马虎”（放松）其多个设计组件，以实现快速适应，而不会过度降低解决方案质量。 Faro 在由运行在 Kubernetes 集群之上的 Ray Serve 组成的堆栈中实现。跟踪驱动的集群部署表明，与最先进的系统相比，Faro 的 SLO 违规率降低了 2.3 倍-23 倍。

papers.title: Achieving Fairness Generalizability for Learning-based Congestion Control with Jury.
papers.abstract: Internet congestion control (CC) has long posed a challenging control problem in networking systems, with recent approaches increasingly incorporating deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to enhance adaptability and performance. Despite promising, DRL-based CC schemes often suffer from poor fairness, particularly when applied to network environments unseen during training. This paper introduces Jury, a novel DRL-based CC scheme designed to achieve fairness generalizability. At its heart, Jury decouples the fairness control from the principal DRL model with two design elements: i) By transforming network signals, it provides a universal view of network environments among competing flows, and ii) It adopts a post-processing phase to dynamically module the sending rate based on flow bandwidth occupancy estimation, ensuring large flows behave more conservatively and smaller flows more aggressively, thus achieving a fair and balanced bandwidth allocation. We have fully implemented Jury, and extensive evaluations demonstrate its robust convergence properties and high performance across a broad spectrum of both emulated and real-world network conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 互联网拥塞控制（CC）长期以来一直在网络系统中提出具有挑战性的控制问题，最近的方法越来越多地结合深度强化学习（DRL）来增强适应性和性能。尽管很有前景，但基于 DRL 的 CC 方案常常缺乏公平性，特别是当应用于训练期间看不见的网络环境时。本文介绍了 Jury，一种新颖的基于 DRL 的 CC 方案，旨在实现公平泛化性。从本质上讲，Jury通过两个设计元素将公平控制与主要DRL模型解耦：i）通过转换网络信号，提供竞争流之间网络环境的通用视图；ii）采用后处理阶段，根据流带宽占用估计动态调整发送速率，确保大流表现得更保守，小流表现得更积极，从而实现公平和平衡的带宽分配。我们已经全面实施了 Jury，广泛的评估证明了其强大的收敛特性以及在广泛的模拟和现实网络条件下的高性能。

papers.title: Achilles: Efficient TEE-Assisted BFT Consensus via Rollback Resilient Recovery.
papers.abstract: BFT consensus that uses Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) to improve the system tolerance and performance is gaining popularity. However, existing works suffer from TEE rollback issues, resulting in a tolerance-performance tradeoff. In this paper, we propose Achilles, an efficient TEE-assisted BFT protocol that breaks the tradeoff. The key idea behind Achilles is removing the expensive rollback prevention of TEEs from the critical path of committing transactions. To this end, Achilles adopts a rollback resilient recovery mechanism, which allows nodes to assist each other in recovering their states. Besides, Achilles follows the chaining spirit in modern chained BFT protocols and leverages customized chained commit rules to achieve linear message complexity, end-to-end transaction latency of four communication steps, and fault tolerance for the minority of Byzantine nodes. Achilles is the first TEE-assisted BFT protocol in line with CFT protocols in these metrics. We implement a prototype of Achilles based on Intel SGX and evaluate it in both LAN and WAN, showcasing its outperforming performance compared to several state-of-the-art counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用可信执行环境（TEE）来提高系统容错性和性能的 BFT 共识越来越受欢迎。然而，现有的工作存在 TEE 回滚问题，导致容忍度与性能之间的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了 Achilles，一种高效的 TEE 辅助 BFT 协议，打破了这种权衡。 Achilles 背后的关键思想是从提交事务的关键路径中消除 TEE 昂贵的回滚预防。为此，Achilles 采用回滚弹性恢复机制，允许节点互相协助恢复状态。此外，Achilles 遵循现代链式 BFT 协议中的链式精神，利用定制的链式提交规则来实现线性消息复杂性、四个通信步骤的端到端事务延迟以及少数拜占庭节点的容错能力。 Achilles 是第一个在这些指标上与 CFT 协议一致的 TEE 辅助 BFT 协议。我们实现了基于 Intel SGX 的 Achilles 原型，并在 LAN 和 WAN 中对其进行了评估，展示了与几种最先进的同类产品相比其卓越的性能。

papers.title: Adios to Busy-Waiting for Microsecond-scale Memory Disaggregation.
papers.abstract: How fast and efficiently page faults are handled determines the performance of paging-based memory disaggregation (MD) systems. Recent MD systems employ busy-waiting in page fault handling to avoid costly interrupt handling and context switching. Upon a page fault, they issue a remote fetch request and busy-wait for the completion of the request rather than yield their execution to other tasks. While these attempts succeed to cut the latency of MD systems to microseconds, they suffer from head-of-line (HOL) blocking that leads to high tail latency and causes RDMA network underutilization.
papers.abstract_zh: 处理页面错误的速度和效率决定了基于分页的内存分解 (MD) 系统的性能。最近的 MD 系统在页面错误处理中采用忙等待来避免昂贵的中断处理和上下文切换。出现页面错误时，它们会发出远程获取请求并忙等待请求的完成，而不是将其执行交给其他任务。虽然这些尝试成功地将 MD 系统的延迟缩短至微秒，但它们受到队头 (HOL) 阻塞的影响，导致尾部延迟较高并导致 RDMA 网络利用率不足。

papers.title: AlloyStack: A Library Operating System for Serverless Workflow Applications.
papers.abstract: Serverless workflow applications, composed of multiple serverless functions, are increasingly popular in production. However, inter-function communication and cold start latency remain key performance bottlenecks. This paper introduces AlloyStack, a library operating system (LibOS) tailored for serverless workflows. AlloyStack addresses two major challenges: (1) reducing cold start latency through on-demand OS component loading and (2) minimizing data transfer overhead by enabling functions within the same workflow to share a single address space, eliminating unnecessary data copying. To ensure secure isolation, AlloyStack uses Memory Protection Keys (MPK) to separate user functions from the LibOS while maintaining efficient data sharing. Our evaluation shows that AlloyStack reduces cold start times by 98.5% to just 1.3ms. Compared to SOTA systems, AlloyStack achieves a 7.3× to 38.7× speedup in Rust end-to-end latency and a 4.8× to 78.3× speedup in other languages for intermediate data-intensive workflows.
papers.abstract_zh: 由多个无服务器功能组成的无服务器工作流应用程序在生产中越来越流行。然而，功能间通信和冷启动延迟仍然是关键的性能瓶颈。本文介绍了 AlloyStack，这是一个专为无服务器工作流程量身定制的图书馆操作系统 (LibOS)。 AlloyStack 解决了两个主要挑战：(1) 通过按需操作系统组件加载来减少冷启动延迟；(2) 通过使同一工作流程中的功能能够共享单个地址空间，从而消除不必要的数据复制，从而最大限度地减少数据传输开销。为了确保安全隔离，AlloyStack 使用内存保护密钥 (MPK) 将用户功能与 LibOS 分离，同时保持高效的数据共享。我们的评估表明，AlloyStack 将冷启动时间缩短了 98.5%，仅为 1.3 毫秒。与 SOTA 系统相比，AlloyStack 在 Rust 端到端延迟方面实现了 7.3 倍到 38.7 倍的加速，在其他语言的中间数据密集型工作流程中实现了 4.8 倍到 78.3 倍的加速。

papers.title: Atlas: Towards Real-Time Verification in Large-Scale Networks via a Native Distributed Architecture.
papers.abstract: Data plane verification (DPV) can be critical in ensuring the network operates correctly. To be useful in practice, they need to be: (1) fast so as to prevent significant packet loss or security violations; (2) scalable so as to accommodate today's large-scale network architecture. Current DPV tools struggle to meet these requirements due to their centralized architecture. To be concrete, there is a bottleneck for a single-point server to perform real-time DPV tasks. Furthermore, a single-point server makes it hard to collect real-time data plane updates from every device in large-scale networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据平面验证 (DPV) 对于确保网络正常运行至关重要。为了在实践中有用，它们需要：（1）速度快，以防止严重的数据包丢失或安全违规； (2)可扩展，以适应当今大规模的网络架构。当前的 DPV 工具由于其集中式架构而难以满足这些要求。具体来说，单点服务器执行实时DPV任务存在瓶颈。此外，单点服务器很难从大规模网络中的每个设备收集实时数据平面更新。

papers.title: BESA: Extending Bugs Triggered by Runtime Testing via Static Analysis.
papers.abstract: Due to limited test cases and execution scenarios, runtime testing often has insufficient code coverage and thus misses many real bugs. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel idea that static analysis of the triggered bug in runtime testing can help extend and detect extra bugs missed by runtime testing. Based on this idea, we develop a new approach named BESA, which can extend null-pointer dereferences found by runtime testing via static analysis. It first collects trace information about the triggered bug in runtime testing, by monitoring PoC (Proof of Concept) execution or analyzing existing failure log. Then, with this trace information, BESA uses a backward propagation analysis based on the call stack of the triggered bug, to effectively identify source variables propagating problematic value to the buggy variable. Finally, according to each source variable, BESA uses a summary-based alias-aware analysis to efficiently track target variables aliased with the buggy variable for detecting extra bugs. We have evaluated BESA on 25 known null-pointer dereferences found by runtime testing in four popular programs (SQLite, VIM, GPAC and Linux kernel). BESA finds 57 extra bugs, and 18 of them are new bugs that have been confirmed.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于测试用例和执行场景有限，运行时测试往往代码覆盖率不足，从而错过了许多真正的错误。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的想法，即对运行时测试中触发的错误进行静态分析可以帮助扩展和检测运行时测试遗漏的额外错误。基于这个想法，我们开发了一种名为BESA的新方法，它可以通过静态分析扩展运行时测试发现的空指针取消引用。它首先通过监视 PoC（概念验证）执行或分析现有故障日志来收集有关运行时测试中触发的错误的跟踪信息。然后，利用此跟踪信息，BESA 使用基于触发错误的调用堆栈的向后传播分析，以有效识别将有问题的值传播到有问题的变量的源变量。最后，根据每个源变量，BESA 使用基于摘要的别名感知分析来有效跟踪与 buggy 变量别名的目标变量，以检测额外的错误。我们对四个流行程序（SQLite、VIM、GPAC 和 Linux 内核）中的运行时测试发现的 25 个已知空指针取消引用进行了 BESA 评估。 BESA 发现了 57 个额外 bug，其中 18 个是已确认的新 bug。

papers.title: Bingo: Radix-based Bias Factorization for Random Walk on Dynamic Graphs.
papers.abstract: Random walks are a primary means for extracting information from large-scale graphs. While most real-world graphs are inherently dynamic, state-of-the-art random walk engines failed to efficiently support such a critical use case. This paper takes the initiative to build a general random walk engine for dynamically changing graphs with two key principles: (i) This system should support both low-latency streaming updates and high-throughput batched updates. (ii) This system should achieve fast sampling speed while maintaining acceptable space consumption to support dynamic graph updates. Upholding both standards, we introduce Bingo, a GPU-based random walk engine for dynamically changing graphs. First, we propose a novel radix-based bias factorization algorithm to support constant time sampling complexity while supporting fast streaming updates. Second, we present a group-adaption design to reduce space consumption dramatically. Third, we incorporate GPU-aware designs to support high-throughput batched graph updates on massively parallel platforms. Together, Bingo outperforms existing efforts across various applications, settings, and datasets, achieving up to a 271.11x speedup compared to the state-of-the-art efforts.
papers.abstract_zh: 随机游走是从大规模图中提取信息的主要手段。虽然大多数现实世界的图表本质上是动态的，但最先进的随机游走引擎无法有效地支持这样一个关键的用例。本文主动构建了一个用于动态变化图的通用随机游走引擎，具有两个关键原则：（i）该系统应支持低延迟流式更新和高吞吐量批量更新。 (ii) 该系统应实现快速采样速度，同时保持可接受的空间消耗以支持动态图更新。秉承这两个标准，我们推出了 Bingo，这是一种基于 GPU 的随机游走引擎，用于动态更改图形。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的基于基数的偏差分解算法，以支持恒定时间采样复杂性，同时支持快速流更新。其次，我们提出了一种群体适应设计，以大幅减少空间消耗。第三，我们采用 GPU 感知设计来支持大规模并行平台上的高吞吐量批量图形更新。总之，Bingo 在各种应用程序、设置和数据集上都优于现有的工作，与最先进的工作相比，速度提高了 271.11 倍。

papers.title: Byte vSwitch: A High-Performance Virtual Switch for Cloud Networking.
papers.abstract: Virtual switch is a fundamental component of cloud computing as it provides core networking functionalities for VMs and containers. Open vSwitch (OVS) is widely adopted in cloud environments due to its open-source nature, programmability, and rich set of features. At ByteDance, we initially adopted OVS in our public cloud, but as our cloud business grew, its generic design along with its complex code-base quickly became obstacles to improvements. Hence, we developed Byte vSwitch (BVS), a high-performance virtual switch that was specifically designed to address the performance, scalability, serviceability, and operational efficiency needs of our cloud services. More specifically, BVS adopts a simple architecture with an optimized hash table to maximize forwarding performance. In addition, we introduced several optimizations to improve BVS scalability, operability, and serviceability in cloud environments. Our evaluations show that BVS achieves up to 3.3× higher PPS and 25% lower latency compared to OVS. BVS has been deployed at scale across all regions of the ByteDance public cloud for over four years, and this paper presents our experience in designing, deploying, and operating BVS in production.
papers.abstract_zh: 虚拟交换机是云计算的基本组成部分，因为它为虚拟机和容器提供核心网络功能。 Open vSwitch (OVS) 因其开源特性、可编程性和丰富的功能而在云环境中得到广泛采用。在字节跳动，我们最初在公有云中采用了 OVS，但随着云业务的增长，其通用设计以及复杂的代码库很快成为改进的障碍。因此，我们开发了 Byte vSwitch (BVS)，这是一种高性能虚拟交换机，专门用于满足云服务的性能、可扩展性、可服务性和运营效率需求。更具体地说，BVS 采用简单的架构和优化的哈希表来最大限度地提高转发性能。此外，我们还引入了多项优化来提高 BVS 在云环境中的可扩展性、可操作性和可服务性。我们的评估表明，与 OVS 相比，BVS 的 PPS 提高了 3.3 倍，延迟降低了 25%。 BVS 已在字节跳动公有云的所有区域大规模部署了四年多，本文介绍了我们在生产中设计、部署和运营 BVS 的经验。

papers.title: CacheBlend: Fast Large Language Model Serving for RAG with Cached Knowledge Fusion.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often incorporate multiple text chunks in their inputs to provide the necessary contexts. To speed up the prefill of the long LLM inputs, one can pre-compute the KV cache of a text and re-use the KV cache when the context is reused as the prefix of another LLM input. However, the reused text chunks are not always the input prefix, which makes precomputed KV caches not directly usable since they ignore the text's cross-attention with the preceding texts. Thus, the benefits of reusing KV caches remain largely unrealized.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通常在其输入中合并多个文本块以提供必要的上下文。为了加速长 LLM 输入的预填充，可以预先计算文本的 KV 缓存，并在上下文被重新用作另一 LLM 输入的前缀时重新使用 KV 缓存。然而，重用的文本块并不总是输入前缀，这使得预先计算的 KV 缓存不能直接使用，因为它们忽略了文本与前面文本的交叉注意力。因此，重用 KV 缓存的好处在很大程度上仍未实现。

papers.title: CAPSys: Contention-aware task placement for data stream processing.
papers.abstract: In the context of streaming dataflow queries, the task placement problem aims to identify a mapping of operator tasks to physical resources in a distributed cluster. We show that task placement not only significantly affects query performance but also the convergence and accuracy of auto-scaling controllers. We propose CAPSys, an adaptive resource controller for dataflow stream processors, that considers auto-scaling and task placement in concert. CAPSys relies on Contention-Aware Placement Search (CAPS), a new placement strategy that ensures compute-intensive, I/O-intensive, and networkintensive tasks are balanced across available resources.
papers.abstract_zh: 在流数据流查询的背景下，任务放置问题旨在识别操作员任务到分布式集群中物理资源的映射。我们表明，任务放置不仅会显着影响查询性能，还会显着影响自动缩放控制器的收敛性和准确性。我们提出了 CAPSys，一种用于数据流流处理器的自适应资源控制器，它同时考虑自动缩放和任务放置。 CAPSys 依赖于竞争感知放置搜索 (CAPS)，这是一种新的放置策略，可确保计算密集型、I/O 密集型和网络密集型任务在可用资源之间实现平衡。

papers.title: Cheetah: Metadata Aggregation for Fast Object Storage without Distributed Ordering.
papers.abstract: Object stores usually maintain the mapping of objects to data servers' disk volumes (referred to as volume metadata) in a central directory, while storing the object data's in-volume offsets (referred to as offset metadata) together with the data on data servers. Unfortunately, the separation between volume/offset metadata complicates the processing of an object put: to ensure consistency, the multiple writes of the object's volume/offset metadata and object data have to be orchestrated in a particular order, which severely lowers object I/O performance. We propose a write-optimal structure called MetaX that aggregates all metadata of a put, including both volume and offset metadata as well as other meta information such as data checksum and temporary meta-log. Based on MetaX, we design the Cheetah object store, which organizes object storage into rich metadata storage (on meta servers) and raw data storage (on data servers). Cheetah removes the distributed ordering constraint on the multiple metadata/data writes by enforcing local atomicity of writing MetaX, while still ensuring consistency. Evaluation shows that Cheetah significantly outperforms existing object stores.
papers.abstract_zh: 对象存储通常在中央目录中维护对象到数据服务器磁盘卷（称为卷元数据）的映射，同时将对象数据的卷内偏移量（称为偏移元数据）与数据服务器上的数据一起存储。不幸的是，卷/偏移量元数据之间的分离使对象写入的处理变得复杂：为了确保一致性，对象的卷/偏移量元数据和对象数据的多次写入必须按特定顺序编排，这严重降低了对象 I/O 性能。我们提出了一种名为 MetaX 的写入优化结构，它聚合了 put 的所有元数据，包括卷和偏移元数据以及其他元信息，例如数据校验和和临时元日志。基于MetaX，我们设计了Cheetah对象存储，它将对象存储组织为丰富的元数据存储（在元服务器上）和原始数据存储（在数据服务器上）。 Cheetah 通过强制写入 MetaX 的本地原子性，消除了对多个元数据/数据写入的分布式排序约束，同时仍然确保一致性。评估表明，Cheetah 的性能明显优于现有的对象存储。

papers.title: Chrono: Meticulous Hotness Measurement and Flexible Page Migration for Memory Tiering.
papers.abstract: As the memory demand continues to surge, the limitations of DRAM scalability have spurred the development of various new memory technologies in today's data centers. In order to harness the benefits of the heterogeneous memory architecture, tiering has become a widely adopted memory management paradigm. The effectiveness of a tiered memory management system primarily relies on its ability to accurately identify frequently accessed ("hot") pages and infrequently accessed ("cold") pages, and efficiently relocate them between tiers. However, existing systems rely on coarse-grained frequency measurement schemes that do not align with the performance characteristics of modern memory devices and memory-intensive applications. Additionally, these systems often incorporate rigid rules or manually configured parameters for page classification, resulting in inflexible migration strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着内存需求持续激增，DRAM 可扩展性的限制刺激了当今数据中心各种新型内存技术的发展。为了利用异构内存架构的优势，分层已成为广泛采用的内存管理范例。分层内存管理系统的有效性主要依赖于其准确识别频繁访问（“热”）页面和不经常访问（“冷”）页面并在层之间有效重新定位它们的能力。然而，现有系统依赖于粗粒度频率测量方案，该方案与现代存储设备和内存密集型应用的性能特征不相符。此外，这些系统通常包含严格的规则或手动配置的页面分类参数，导致迁移策略不灵活。

papers.title: Collaborative Text Editing with Eg-walker: Better, Faster, Smaller.
papers.abstract: Collaborative text editing algorithms allow several users to concurrently modify a text file, and automatically merge concurrent edits into a consistent state. Existing algorithms fall in two categories: Operational Transformation (OT) algorithms are slow to merge files that have diverged substantially due to offline editing; CRDTs are slow to load and consume a lot of memory. We introduce Eg-walker, a collaboration algorithm for text that avoids these weaknesses. Compared to existing CRDTs, it consumes an order of magnitude less memory in the steady state, and loading a document from disk is orders of magnitude faster. Compared to OT, merging long-running branches is orders of magnitude faster. In the worst case, the merging performance of Eg-walker is comparable with existing CRDT algorithms. Eg-walker can be used everywhere CRDTs are used, including peer-to-peer systems without a central server. By offering performance that is competitive with centralised algorithms, our result paves the way towards the widespread adoption of peer-to-peer collaboration software.
papers.abstract_zh: 协作文本编辑算法允许多个用户同时修改文本文件，并自动将并发编辑合并为一致状态。现有算法分为两类：操作转换 (OT) 算法合并由于离线编辑而出现严重分歧的文件的速度很慢； CRDT 加载速度慢并且消耗大量内存。我们引入了 Eg-walker，一种避免这些弱点的文本协作算法。与现有的 CRDT 相比，它在稳定状态下消耗的内存要少一个数量级，并且从磁盘加载文档的速度要快几个数量级。与 OT 相比，合并长时间运行的分支要快几个数量级。在最坏的情况下，Eg-walker的合并性能与现有的CRDT算法相当。 Eg-walker 可以在任何使用 CRDT 的地方使用，包括没有中央服务器的点对点系统。通过提供与集中式算法竞争的性能，我们的结果为点对点协作软件的广泛采用铺平了道路。

papers.title: Comprehensive Deadlock Prevention for GPU Collective Communication.
papers.abstract: Distributed deep neural network training necessitates efficient GPU collective communications, which are inherently susceptible to deadlocks. GPU collective deadlocks arise easily in distributed deep learning applications when multiple collectives circularly wait for each other. GPU collective deadlocks pose a significant challenge to the correct functioning and efficiency of distributed deep learning, and no general effective solutions are currently available. Only in specific scenarios, ad-hoc methods, making an application invoke collectives in a consistent order across GPUs, can be used to prevent circular collective dependency and deadlocks.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式深度神经网络训练需要高效的 GPU 集体通信，而这本质上很容易出现死锁。当多个集体相互循环等待时，分布式深度学习应用程序中很容易出现 GPU 集体死锁。 GPU集体死锁对分布式深度学习的正确运行和效率提出了重大挑战，目前还没有通用有效的解决方案。仅在特定场景中，可以使用临时方法（使应用程序在 GPU 上以一致的顺序调用集合）来防止循环集合依赖和死锁。

papers.title: CRAVE: Analyzing Cross-Resource Interaction to Improve Energy Efficiency in Systems-on-Chip.
papers.abstract: Mobile platforms make use of dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) to trade off runtime performance and power consumption for their systems-on-chip (SoCs). State-of-the-art governors in the OS use application-based characteristics to control the SoC's DVFS settings for CPU cores, as well as the GPU in some SoCs. Through experimental characterization of real-world mobile platforms, we find that key SoC components have a complex relationship with one another, which directly affects their performance and power usage. This relationship is dependent on the architecture of the SoC as it is caused by the interaction of processing elements such as the CPU and GPU through a shared main memory. Unfortunately, existing application-oriented governors do not explicitly capture this design-induced relationship.
papers.abstract_zh: 移动平台利用动态电压和频率调节 (DVFS) 来权衡片上系统 (SoC) 的运行时性能和功耗。操作系统中最先进的调节器使用基于应用程序的特性来控制 SoC 的 CPU 内核的 D​​VFS 设置，以及某些 SoC 中的 GPU。通过对真实移动平台的实验表征，我们发现关键 SoC 组件之间存在复杂的关系，这直接影响其性能和功耗。这种关系取决于 SoC 的架构，因为它是由 CPU 和 GPU 等处理元件通过共享主内存进行交互引起的。不幸的是，现有的面向应用程序的调控器没有明确捕获这种设计引起的关系。

papers.title: Daredevil: Rescue Your Flash Storage from Inflexible Kernel Storage Stack.
papers.abstract: Existing kernel storage stacks for NVMe SSDs struggle to address performance interference between I/O requests from tenants with different SLAs, leading to the multi-tenancy issue. Addressing this requires separating their I/O requests within the NVMe I/O queues (NQs). However, our analysis reveals that the static CPU core-NQ bindings of current storage stacks restrict their flexibility to achieve this goal.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的 NVMe SSD 内核存储堆栈难以解决具有不同 SLA 的租户 I/O 请求之间的性能干扰，从而导致多租户问题。解决这个问题需要在 NVMe I/O 队列 (NQ) 中分离它们的 I/O 请求。然而，我们的分析表明，当前存储堆栈的静态 CPU 核心-NQ 绑定限制了它们实现这一目标的灵活性。

papers.title: Deft: A Scalable Tree Index for Disaggregated Memory.
papers.abstract: Memory disaggregation has become an inexorable trend in data centers and the cloud. By physically separating compute and memory resources into independent pools and connecting them with high-speed networks, memory disaggregation enables high resource utilization and elastic resource scaling. However, traditional tree-based indexes become inefficient on disaggregated memory: (1) large tree nodes can easily saturate network bandwidth due to I/O amplification, yet small tree nodes increase network round trips; (2) expensive concurrency control schemes restrict the scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存分解已成为数据中心和云的必然趋势。通过将计算和内存资源物理上分离到独立的池中并将它们与高速网络连接，内存分解可以实现高资源利用率和弹性资源扩展。然而，传统的基于树的索引在分解内存上变得低效：（1）大的树节点很容易由于I/O放大而使网络带宽饱和，而小的树节点会增加网络往返次数； (2)昂贵的并发控制方案限制了可扩展性。

papers.title: DeltaZip: Efficient Serving of Multiple Full-Model-Tuned LLMs.
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) greatly improves model quality for downstream tasks. However, serving many fine-tuned LLMs concurrently is challenging due to the sporadic, bursty, and varying request patterns of different LLMs. To bridge this gap, we present DeltaZip, an LLM serving system that efficiently serves multiple full-parameter fine-tuned models concurrently by aggressively compressing model deltas by up to 10× while maintaining high model quality. The key insight behind this design is that fine-tuning results in small-magnitude changes to the pre-trained model. By co-designing the serving system with the compression algorithm, DeltaZip achieves 2× to 12× improvement in throughput compared to the state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 微调大型语言模型 (LLM) 极大地提高了下游任务的模型质量。然而，由于不同法学硕士的请求模式是零星的、突发的和变化的，同时为许多经过微调的法学硕士提供服务是一项挑战。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 DeltaZip，这是一种 LLM 服务系统，可通过将模型增量压缩高达 10 倍，同时保持高模型质量，从而有效地同时服务多个全参数微调模型。这种设计背后的关键见解是微调会导致预训练模型发生小幅度的变化。通过共同设计服务系统和压缩算法，与最先进的系统相比，DeltaZip 的吞吐量提高了 2 倍到 12 倍。

papers.title: DPack: Efficiency-Oriented Privacy Budget Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Machine learning (ML) models can leak information about users, and differential privacy (DP) provides a rigorous way to bound that leakage under a given budget. This DP budget can be regarded as a new type of computing resource in workloads of multiple ML models training on user data. Once it is used, the DP budget is forever consumed. Therefore, it is crucial to allocate it most efficiently to train as many models as possible. This paper presents a scheduler for the privacy resources that optimizes for efficiency. We formulate privacy scheduling as a new type of multidimensional knapsack problem, called privacy knapsack, which maximizes DP budget efficiency. We show that privacy knapsack is NP-hard, hence practical algorithms are necessarily approximate. We develop an approximation algorithm for privacy knapsack, DPack, and evaluate it on microbenchmarks and on a new, synthetic private-ML workload we developed from the Alibaba ML cluster trace. We show that DPack: (1) often approaches the efficiency-optimal schedule, (2) consistently schedules more tasks compared to a state-of-the-art privacy scheduling algorithm that focused on fairness instead of efficiency (1.3-1.7× in Alibaba, 1.0-2.6X in microbenchmarks), but (3) sacrifices some level of fairness for efficiency. Using DPack, DP ML operators should be able to train more models on the same amount of user data while offering the same privacy guarantee to their users.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 模型可能会泄露有关用户的信息，而差分隐私 (DP) 提供了一种严格的方法来将这种泄露限制在给定的预算范围内。这种 DP 预算可以被视为在用户数据上训练多个 ML 模型的工作负载中的一种新型计算资源。一旦使用，DP预算就永远被消耗掉。因此，最有效地分配它来训练尽可能多的模型至关重要。本文提出了一种优化效率的隐私资源调度程序。我们将隐私调度制定为一种新型的多维背包问题，称为隐私背包，它最大化 DP 预算效率。我们证明隐私背包是 NP 困难的，因此实际算法必然是近似的。我们开发了一种隐私背包 DPack 的近似算法，并在微基准测试和我们根据阿里巴巴 ML 集群跟踪开发的新的合成私有 ML 工作负载上对其进行评估。我们证明，DPack：（1）经常接近效率最优调度，（2）与关注公平而不是效率的最先进的隐私调度算法相比，一致地调度更多任务（阿里巴巴为 1.3-1.7 倍，微基准为 1.0-2.6 倍），但是（3）为了效率而牺牲了一定程度的公平性。使用 DPack，DP ML 运营商应该能够在相同数量的用户数据上训练更多模型，同时为用户提供相同的隐私保证。

papers.title: Efeu: generating efficient, verified, hybrid hardware/software drivers for I2C devices.
papers.abstract: Writing device drivers is notoriously hard, and driver bugs are a major cause of system failures and vulnerabilities. The problem is particularly acute in bus-based protocols like I2C, where driver correctness is only half the story: correct functioning of the complete subsystem depends on all components on the bus interoperating correctly. Unfortunately, developers cannot control all aspects of a platform, and must interact with existing devices (peripherals and/or hardware bus controllers) which may misbehave. Failures in a protocol like I2C, often used in critical low-level system management, can result in permanent damage to the hardware, whether a server or a satellite.
papers.abstract_zh: 编写设备驱动程序是出了名的困难，驱动程序错误是系统故障和漏洞的主要原因。这个问题在 I2C 等基于总线的协议中尤其严重，其中驱动程序的正确性只是故事的一半：整个子系统的正确运行取决于总线上所有组件的正确互操作。不幸的是，开发人员无法控制平台的所有方面，并且必须与可能出现异常行为的现有设备（外设和/或硬件总线控制器）进行交互。 I2C 等协议（通常用于关键的低级系统管理）的故障可能会导致硬件（无论是服务器还是卫星）的永久性损坏。

papers.title: Empower Vision Applications with LoRA LMM.
papers.abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have shown significant progress in various complex vision tasks with the solid linguistic and reasoning capacity inherited from large language models (LMMs). Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) offers a promising method to integrate external knowledge into LMMs, compensating for their limitations on domain-specific tasks. However, the existing LoRA model serving is excessively computationally expensive and causes extremely high latency. In this paper, we present an end-to-end solution that empowers diverse vision tasks and enriches vision applications with LoRA LMMs. Our system, VaLoRA, enables accurate and efficient vision tasks by 1) an accuracy-aware LoRA adapter generation approach that generates LoRA adapters rich in domain-specific knowledge to meet application-specific accuracy requirements, 2) an adaptive-tiling LoRA adapters batching operator that efficiently computes concurrent heterogeneous LoRA adapters, and 3) a flexible LoRA adapter orchestration mechanism that manages application requests and LoRA adapters to achieve the lowest average response latency. We prototype VaLoRA on five popular vision tasks on three LMMs. Experiment results reveal that VaLoRA improves 24-62% of the accuracy compared to the original LMMs and reduces 20-89% of the latency compared to the state-of-the-art LoRA model serving systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）继承了大型语言模型（LMM）的扎实语言和推理能力，在各种复杂的视觉任务中取得了显着进展。低秩适应 (LoRA) 提供了一种将外部知识集成到 LMM 中的有前途的方法，弥补了它们在特定领域任务上的局限性。然而，现有的 LoRA 模型服务计算成本过高，并且导致极高的延迟。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端解决方案，可通过 LoRA LMM 实现多样化的视觉任务并丰富视觉应用。我们的系统 VaLoRA 通过以下方式实现准确高效的视觉任务：1) 准确度感知的 LoRA 适配器生成方法，可生成富含特定领域知识的 LoRA 适配器，以满足特定于应用程序的准确度要求；2) 自适应平铺 LoRA 适配器批处理运算符，可有效计算并发异构 LoRA 适配器；3) 灵活的 LoRA 适配器编排机制，可管理应用程序请求和 LoRA 适配器，以实现最低的平均响应延迟。我们在三个 LMM 上针对五种流行的视觉任务对 VaLoRA 进行了原型设计。实验结果表明，与原始 LMM 相比，VaLoRA 的精度提高了 24-62%，与最先进的 LoRA 模型服务系统相比，延迟降低了 20-89%。

papers.title: Empowering WebAssembly with Thin Kernel Interfaces.
papers.abstract: Wasm is gaining popularity outside the Web as a well-specified low-level binary format with ISA portability, low memory footprint and polyglot targetability, enabling efficient in-process sandboxing of untrusted code. Despite these advantages, Wasm adoption for new domains is often hindered by the lack of many standard system interfaces which precludes reusability of existing software and slows ecosystem growth.
papers.abstract_zh: Wasm 作为一种明确指定的低级二进制格式，具有 ISA 可移植性、低内存占用和多语言目标能力，在 Web 之外越来越受欢迎，能够对不受信任的代码进行高效的进程内沙箱处理。尽管有这些优势，但 Wasm 在新领域的采用常常因缺乏许多标准系统接口而受到阻碍，这些接口阻碍了现有软件的可重用性并减缓了生态系统的增长。

papers.title: Enabling Virtual Priority in Data Center Congestion Control.
papers.abstract: In data center networks, various types of traffic with strict performance requirements operate simultaneously, necessitating effective isolation and scheduling through priority queues. However, most switches support only around ten priority queues. Virtual priority can address this limitation by emulating multi-priority queues on a single physical queue, but existing solutions often require complex switch-level scheduling and hardware changes. Our key insight is that virtual priority can be achieved by carefully managing bandwidth contention in a physical queue, which is traditionally handled by congestion control (CC) algorithms. Hence, the virtual priority mechanism needs to be tightly coupled with CC. In this paper, we propose PrioPlus, a CC enhancement algorithm that can be integrated with existing congestion control schemes to enable virtual priority transmission. PrioPlus assigns specific delay ranges to different priority levels, ensuring that flows transmit only when the delay is within the assigned range, effectively meeting virtual priority requirements. Compared to Swift CC with physical priority queues, PrioPlus provides strict priority for high-priority flows without impacting performance sensibly. Meanwhile, it benefits low-priority flows from 25% to 41% as its priority-aware design enhances CC's ability to fully utilize available bandwidth once higher-priority traffic completes. As a result, in coflow and model training scenarios, PrioPlus improves job completion times by 21% and 33%, respectively, compared to Swift with physical priority queues.
papers.abstract_zh: 在数据中心网络中，各种类型、性能要求严格的流量同时运行，需要通过优先级队列进行有效的隔离和调度。然而，大多数交换机仅支持大约十个优先级队列。虚拟优先级可以通过在单个物理队列上模拟多优先级队列来解决此限制，但现有解决方案通常需要复杂的交换机级调度和硬件更改。我们的主要见解是，可以通过仔细管理物理队列中的带宽争用来实现虚拟优先级，而物理队列传统上是由拥塞控制 (CC) 算法处理的。因此，虚拟优先级机制需要与CC紧密耦合。在本文中，我们提出了PrioPlus，一种CC增强算法，可以与现有的拥塞控制方案集成以实现虚拟优先级传输。 PrioPlus为不同的优先级分配特定的延迟范围，保证流只有在延迟范围内时才传输，有效满足虚拟优先级要求。与具有物理优先级队列的 Swift CC 相比，PrioPlus 为高优先级流提供严格的优先级，而不会明显影响性能。同时，它使低优先级流量从 25% 增加到 41%，因为其优先级感知设计增强了 CC 在高优先级流量完成后充分利用可用带宽的能力。因此，在协同流和模型训练场景中，与具有物理优先级队列的 Swift 相比，PrioPlus 的作业完成时间分别提高了 21% 和 33%。

papers.title: eNetSTL: Towards an In-kernel Library for High-Performance eBPF-based Network Functions.
papers.abstract: Using extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF) to implement networking functions (NFs) has been a promising trend for modern network infrastructure. In this paper, we endeavor to implement 35 representative NFs with eBPF, but encounter inherent problems of either incomplete functionality or performance degradation of up to 49.2%. Conventional solutions like modifying the eBPF infrastructure or implementing functions directly in the kernel can lead to intrusive and unstable modifications.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用扩展的伯克利数据包过滤器 (eBPF) 来实现网络功能 (NF) 已成为现代网络基础设施的一个有前途的趋势。在本文中，我们尝试使用 eBPF 实现 35 个具有代表性的 NF，但遇到了功能不完整或性能下降高达 49.2% 的固有问题。修改 eBPF 基础设施或直接在内核中实现功能等传统解决方案可能会导致侵入性和不稳定的修改。

papers.title: Erebor: A Drop-In Sandbox Solution for Private Data Processing in Untrusted Confidential Virtual Machines.
papers.abstract: Confidential virtual machines (CVMs) are designed to protect data in cloud machines, but they fail in this task in common Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) cloud environments. In such settings, the software stack within a CVM, including service programs and the operating system, that receives and processes data may intentionally disclose it to attackers. We present Erebor, a sandboxing architecture for CVMs that processes client data in secure containers, where restrictions apply to both (a) access by all untrusted outside components and (b) the sandbox's ability to communicate data through memory and software-controlled direct or covert exits. Erebor enables such restrictions through a security monitor design based on intra-kernel privilege isolation for CVM, fully compatible with emerging cloud deployments without requiring host modifications. Under realistic scenarios, such as large language model inference and private information retrieval, Erebor only adds a performance overhead of 4.5%-13.2%, demonstrating its practicality in terms of enabling strong data sandboxing in modern cloud machines.
papers.abstract_zh: 机密虚拟机 (CVM) 旨在保护云计算机中的数据，但在常见的软件即服务 (SaaS) 云环境中，它们无法完成此任务。在此类设置中，CVM 内接收和处理数据的软件堆栈（包括服务程序和操作系统）可能会故意将数据泄露给攻击者。我们提出了 Erebor，这是一种用于 CVM 的沙箱架构，可在安全容器中处理客户端数据，其中限制适用于 (a) 所有不受信任的外部组件的访问以及 (b) 沙箱通过内存和软件控制的直接或隐蔽出口通信数据的能力。 Erebor 通过基于 CVM 内核内权限隔离的安全监控设计来实现此类限制，完全兼容新兴云部署，无需修改主机。在大型语言模型推理、隐私信息检索等现实场景下，Erebor仅增加了4.5%-13.2%的性能开销，展示了其在现代云机器中实现强数据沙箱方面的实用性。

papers.title: Eva: Cost-Efficient Cloud-Based Cluster Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Cloud computing offers flexibility in resource provisioning, allowing an organization to host its batch processing workloads cost-efficiently by dynamically scaling the size and composition of a cloud-based cluster - a collection of instances provisioned from the cloud. However, existing schedulers fail to minimize total cost due to suboptimal task and instance scheduling strategies, interference between co-located tasks, and instance provisioning overheads. We present Eva, a scheduler for cloud-based clusters that reduces the overall cost of hosting long-running batch jobs. Eva leverages reservation price from economics to derive the optimal set of instances to provision and task-to-instance assignments. Eva also takes into account performance degradation when co-locating tasks and quantitatively evaluates the trade-off between short-term migration overhead and long-term provision savings when considering a change in cluster configuration. Experiments on AWS EC2 and large-scale trace-driven simulations demonstrate that Eva reduces costs by 42% while incurring only a 15% increase in JCT, compared to provisioning a separate instance for each task.
papers.abstract_zh: 云计算提供了资源配置的灵活性，允许组织通过动态扩展基于云的集群（从云中配置的实例的集合）的大小和组成来经济高效地托管其批处理工作负载。然而，由于任务和实例调度策略不理想、共置任务之间的干扰以及实例配置开销，现有调度程序无法最小化总成本。我们推出了 Eva，一种基于云的集群调度程序，可降低托管长时间运行的批处理作业的总体成本。 Eva 利用经济学中的预留价格来导出最佳实例集以进行配置和任务到实例分配。 Eva 还考虑了共置任务时的性能下降，并在考虑集群配置更改时定量评估短期迁移开销和长期配置节省之间的权衡。 AWS EC2 和大规模跟踪驱动模拟上的实验表明，与为每个任务配置单独的实例相比，Eva 可以降低 42% 的成本，同时 JCT 仅增加 15%。

papers.title: Fast State Restoration in LLM Serving with HCache.
papers.abstract: The growing complexity of LLM usage today, e.g., multi-round conversation and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), makes contextual states (i.e., KV cache) reusable across user requests. Given the capacity constraints of GPU memory, only a limited number of contexts can be cached on GPU for reusing. Existing inference systems typically evict part of the KV cache and restore it by recomputing it from the original tokens or offloading it to host storage for later retrieval, both of which introduce substantial computational or I/O overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，LLM 使用的复杂性不断增加，例如多轮对话和检索增强生成 (RAG)，使得上下文状态（即 KV 缓存）可以跨用户请求重用。考虑到 GPU 内存的容量限制，只有有限数量的上下文可以缓存在 GPU 上以供重用。现有的推理系统通常会逐出部分 KV 缓存，并通过从原始令牌重新计算它或将其卸载到主机存储以供以后检索来恢复它，这两者都会带来大量的计算或 I/O 开销。

papers.title: FastIOV: Fast Startup of Passthrough Network I/O Virtualization for Secure Containers.
papers.abstract: Single Root I/O Virtualization (SR-IOV) technology has advanced in recent years and can simultaneously satisfy the network requirements of high data plane performance, high deployment density, and fast startup for applications in traditional containers. However, it falls short with secure containers, which have become the mainstream choice in multi-tenant clouds. SR-IOV requires secure containers to use passthrough I/O for higher data plane performance, which hinders the container startup performance and prevents its usage in time-sensitive tasks like serverless computing. In this paper, we advocate that the startup performance of SR-IOV enabled secure containers can be further boosted, making SR-IOV suitable for building a Container Network Interface (CNI) for secure containers. We first dissect the end-to-end concurrent startup process and identify three key bottlenecks that lead to the slow startup, including Virtual Function I/O device set management, Direct Memory Access memory mapping, and Virtual Function (VF) driver initialization. We then propose a CNI named FastIOV that addresses these bottlenecks through lock decomposition, unnecessary mapping skipping, decoupled zeroing, and asynchronous VF driver initialization. Our evaluation shows that FastIOV reduces the overhead of enabling SR-IOV for secure containers by 96.1%, achieving 65.7% and 75.4% reductions in the average and 99th percentile end-to-end startup time.
papers.abstract_zh: 单根I/O虚拟化（SR-IOV）技术近年来发展迅速，能够同时满足传统容器中应用高数据面性能、高部署密度、快速启动的网络需求。然而，它在安全容器方面存在不足，而安全容器已成为多租户云的主流选择。 SR-IOV 要求安全容器使用直通 I/O 来获得更高的数据平面性能，这会阻碍容器的启动性能并阻止其在无服务器计算等时间敏感任务中使用。在本文中，我们主张可以进一步提升启用SR-IOV的安全容器的启动性能，使SR-IOV适合为安全容器构建容器网络接口（CNI）。我们首先剖析端到端并发启动过程，找出导致启动缓慢的三个关键瓶颈，包括虚拟功能 I/O 设备集管理、直接内存访问内存映射和虚拟功能 (VF) 驱动程序初始化。然后，我们提出了一个名为 FastIOV 的 CNI，它通过锁分解、不必要的映射跳过、解耦归零和异步 VF 驱动程序初始化来解决这些瓶颈。我们的评估表明，FastIOV 将安全容器启用 SR-IOV 的开销降低了 96.1%，平均端到端启动时间和第 99 个百分点的端到端启动时间分别减少了 65.7% 和 75.4%。

papers.title: Flex: Fast, Accurate DNN Inference on Low-Cost Edges Using Heterogeneous Accelerator Execution.
papers.abstract: Significant b reakthroughs in machine learning (ML) and the advantages of on-device processing have led to edge devices increasingly incorporating accelerators like GPUs, NPUs, and DSPs. However, these accelerators consume energy, prompting users to limit their floating-point precision. Many edge device users are in regions where including high-fidelity accelerators is too costly, leading to low-cost devices with low precision, sacrificing accuracy. Previous work predetermined layer assignments between the CPU and accelerator offline for high accuracy and low latency without considering the input, but we observe that input affects optimal layer assignment. To address this, we present Flex, a system for Fast, Accurate DNN Inference on Low-Cost Edges using Heterogeneous Accelerator eXecution. Leveraging common observations from models on various edge devices, Flex uses a lightweight heuristic and reinforcement learning (RL) to dynamically assign layers across the CPU and accelerator. Experiments show Flex improves average inference time by up to 39%, accuracy by up to 22%, and energy consumption by up to 61% compared to state-of-the-art methods, and is only 4.2% less optimal than the best achievable results.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的重大突破和设备上处理的优势导致边缘设备越来越多地采用 GPU、NPU 和 DSP 等加速器。然而，这些加速器会消耗能量，促使用户限制其浮点精度。许多边缘设备用户所处的地区使用高保真加速器的成本太高，导致低成本设备的精度较低，从而牺牲了准确性。之前的工作在不考虑输入的情况下离线预先确定了 CPU 和加速器之间的层分配，以实现高精度和低延迟，但我们观察到输入会影响最佳层分配。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 Flex，这是一种使用异构加速器执行在低成本边缘上进行快速、准确的 DNN 推理的系统。 Flex 利用各种边缘设备上模型的常见观察结果，使用轻量级启发式和强化学习 (RL) 来跨 CPU 和加速器动态分配层。实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，Flex 的平均推理时间提高了 39%，准确度提高了 22%，能耗降低了 61%，并且仅比可实现的最佳结果差了 4.2%。

papers.title: FlowCheck: Decoupling Checkpointing and Training of Large-Scale Models.
papers.abstract: Checkpointing is becoming a hotspot of interest in both academia and industry as the primary fault-tolerance method for large model training. However, existing checkpoint designs are tightly coupled with the training process, leading to interruptions that reduce overall training efficiency. To reduce the impact of checkpoints on training, this paper presents FlowCheck, a novel checkpointing system that decouples checkpoint operations from the training process, enabling checkpoint saving without blocking the training. Specifically, FlowCheck updates the checkpoints by extracting complete gradient information from the network traffic of normal training. FlowCheck deploys a traffic-mirroring network to support this design. To utilize mirrored traffic for checkpointing operations, two key challenges need to be addressed. First, we need to achieve precise identification and extraction of gradient packets from training traffic. Second, the transmission on the mirror link is unreliable due to its inability to trigger retransmission upon packet loss. Through two key designs: (1) packet-counting-based traffic identification, and (2) packet redundancy recovery mechanism, FlowCheck implements an efficient checkpointing system using the existing training network and solves the above two challenges. Experiments and estimations verify that FlowCheck achieves checkpoint operations with zero impact on training, and demonstrate that FlowCheck achieves over 98% effective training time under practical fault conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为大型模型训练的主要容错方法，检查点正在成为学术界和工业界关注的热点。然而，现有的检查点设计与训练过程紧密耦合，导致中断，从而降低整体训练效率。为了减少检查点对训练的影响，本文提出了 FlowCheck，这是一种新颖的检查点系统，它将检查点操作与训练过程解耦，从而能够在不阻塞训练的情况下保存检查点。具体来说，FlowCheck通过从正常训练的网络流量中提取完整的梯度信息来更新检查点。 FlowCheck 部署流量镜像网络来支持此设计。为了利用镜像流量进行检查点操作，需要解决两个关键挑战。首先，我们需要实现训练流量中梯度包的精确识别和提取。其次，镜像链路上的传输不可靠，丢包时无法触发重传。 FlowCheck通过两个关键设计：（1）基于数据包计数的流量识别，（2）数据包冗余恢复机制，利用现有的训练网络实现了高效的检查点系统，并解决了上述两个挑战。实验和估算验证了FlowCheck实现了对训练零影响的检查点操作，并证明FlowCheck在实际故障情况下实现了98%以上的有效训练时间。

papers.title: Fork: A Dual Congestion Control Loop for Small and Large Flows in Datacenters.
papers.abstract: Many existing transport designs aim to deliver ultra-low latency and high bandwidth for applications in high-speed datacenter networks. However, almost all of them intertwine the control of small and large flows using the same control entity (e.g., sender or receiver) and congestion feedback signal (e.g., ECN or credit), thus bringing significant performance impairments. By contrast, we seek to decouple the rate control of small flows from that of large ones.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多现有的传输设计旨在为高速数据中心网络中的应用程序提供超低延迟和高带宽。然而，几乎所有这些都使用相同的控制实体（例如发送者或接收者）和拥塞反馈信号（例如ECN或信用）来交织小流和大流的控制，从而带来显着的性能损害。相比之下，我们寻求将小流量的速率控制与大流量的速率控制脱钩。

papers.title: Garbage Collection Does Not Only Collect Garbage: Piggybacking-Style Defragmentation for Deduplicated Backup Storage.
papers.abstract: Deduplication is widely used in backup storage and reduces storage overhead by allowing backups to share common data chunks. However, it naturally disrupts the sequential layout of backup images, leading to fragmentation, which slows down backup restoration. Existing solutions to this issue often come with trade-offs, either reducing deduplication effectiveness or introducing significant I/O overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 重复数据删除广泛应用于备份存储，并通过允许备份共享公共数据块来减少存储开销。然而，它自然会破坏备份映像的顺序布局，导致碎片，从而减慢备份恢复速度。此问题的现有解决方案通常需要权衡，要么降低重复数据删除效率，要么引入大量 I/O 开销。

papers.title: Groot: Graph-Centric Row Reordering with Tree for Sparse Matrix Multiplications on Tensor Cores.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix multiplications are essential in scientific computing and machine learning applications. Recent researches offload sparse operations, such as sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpMM) and sampled dense-dense matrix multiplication (SDDMM), on Tensor Cores (TCs) for improved performance. However, their performance is often limited by the matrix's inherent sparsity and irregularity. In this paper, we find row reordering can potentially improve sparse operations on TCs, but existing reordering techniques exhibit limitations that hinder their effectiveness. To address the issues, we propose Groot, a graph-centric row reordering algorithm with tree. Groot aims to minimize row differences across the matrix, which is proved to be a NP-hard problem. To approximate the optimal solution, Groot firstly captures the local structure of the sparse matrix by constructing a k-nearest neighbor graph, where rows are represented as nodes. Then, it extracts a minimum spanning tree from the constructed graph for global structure optimization. Lastly, Groot traverses the extracted tree to obtain the final ordering. We evaluate Groot using real-world datasets in comparison with state-of-the-art reordering algorithms. Our results show that Groot significantly enhances the computational intensity of SpMM and SDDMM on TCs, delivering the average speedups of 1.8× and 2.0×, respectively. Furthermore, the performance gains extend broadly to sparse computations on CUDA cores and GNN systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵乘法在科学计算和机器学习应用中至关重要。最近的研究在张量核心 (TC) 上卸载稀疏操作，例如稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 和采样稠密矩阵乘法 (SDDMM)，以提高性能。然而，它们的性能往往受到矩阵固有的稀疏性和不规则性的限制。在本文中，我们发现行重新排序可以潜在地改善 TC 上的稀疏操作，但现有的重新排序技术存在局限性，阻碍了其有效性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Groot，一种以图为中心的树行重新排序算法。 Groot 的目标是最小化矩阵上的行差异，这被证明是一个 NP 难问题。为了逼近最优解，Groot 首先通过构造 k 最近邻图来捕获稀疏矩阵的局部结构，其中行表示为节点。然后，它从构造的图中提取最小生成树以进行全局结构优化。最后，Groot 遍历提取的树以获得最终的排序。我们使用真实世界的数据集与最先进的重新排序算法进行比较来评估 Groot。我们的结果表明，Groot 显着增强了 TC 上 SpMM 和 SDDMM 的计算强度，平均加速分别为 1.8 倍和 2.0 倍。此外，性能提升广泛扩展到 CUDA 核心和 GNN 系统上的稀疏计算。

papers.title: HawkSet: Automatic, Application-Agnostic, and Efficient Concurrent PM Bug Detection.
papers.abstract: Persistent Memory (PM) enables the development of fast, persistent applications without employing costly HDD/SSD-based I/O operations. Since caches are volatile and CPUs may reorder and stall memory accesses for performance, developers must use low-level instructions to ensure a consistent state in case of a crash. Failure to do so can result in data corruption, data loss, or undefined behavior. In concurrent executions, this exposes a new class of bugs.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久内存 (PM) 可以开发快速、持久的应用程序，而无需使用昂贵的基于 HDD/SSD 的 I/O 操作。由于缓存是易失性的，并且 CPU 可能会为了性能而重新排序和停止内存访问，因此开发人员必须使用低级指令来确保在崩溃时保持一致的状态。否则可能会导致数据损坏、数据丢失或未定义的行为。在并发执行中，这会暴露出一类新的错误。

papers.title: Heimdall: Optimizing Storage I/O Admission with Extensive Machine Learning Pipeline.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Heimdall, a highly accurate and efficient machine learning-powered I/O admission policy for flash storage, designed to operate in a black-box manner. We make domain-specific innovations in various ML stages by introducing accurate period-based labeling, 3-stage noise filtering, in-depth feature engineering, and fine-grained tuning, which together improve the decision accuracy from 67% up to 93%. We perform various deployment optimizations to reach a sub-μs inference latency and a small, 28KB, memory overhead. With 500 unbiased random experiments derived from production traces, we show Heimdall delivers 15-35% lower average I/O latency compared to the state of the art and up to 2x faster to a baseline. Heimdall is ready for user-level, in-kernel, and distributed deployments.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Heimdall，这是一种高度准确且高效的基于机器学习的闪存 I/O 准入策略，旨在以黑盒方式运行。我们通过引入精确的基于周期的标记、三级噪声过滤、深入的特征工程和细粒度的调整，在各个机器学习阶段进行了特定领域的创新，将决策准确率从 67% 提高到 93%。我们执行各种部署优化，以达到亚微秒的推理延迟和较小的 28KB 内存开销。通过从生产跟踪中得出的 500 个无偏差随机实验，我们发现与现有技术相比，Heimdall 的平均 I/O 延迟降低了 15-35%，并且速度比基线快了 2 倍。 Heimdall 已准备好进行用户级、内核内和分布式部署。

papers.title: Hey Hey, My My, Skewness Is Here to Stay: Challenges and Opportunities in Cloud Block Store Traffic.
papers.abstract: Elastic Block Storage (EBS) has a pivotal role in modern data center infrastructure, providing reliable, high-performance and flexible block storage service to users. In Alibaba Cloud, EBS is the most widely used service and has been supporting the operation of millions of virtual disks. However, even with layers of load balancing and caching, we still observe significant traffic skewness across the EBS stack. This motivates us to comprehensively investigate symptoms and root causes behind the traffic patterns and, more importantly, explore the fixes for the identified issues.
papers.abstract_zh: 弹性块存储（EBS）在现代数据中心基础设施中发挥着举足轻重的作用，为用户提供可靠、高性能、灵活的块存储服务。在阿里云中，EBS是使用最广泛的服务，已经支撑了数百万个虚拟磁盘的运行。然而，即使有负载平衡和缓存层，我们仍然观察到整个 EBS 堆栈上存在显着的流量偏差。这促使我们全面调查流量模式背后的症状和根本原因，更重要的是，探索已识别问题的解决方案。

papers.title: Hourglass: Enabling Efficient Split Federated Learning with Data Parallelism.
HybridFlow: A Flexible and Efficient RLHF Framework.
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is widely used in Large Language Model (LLM) alignment. Traditional RL can be modeled as a dataflow, where each node represents computation of a neural network (NN) and each edge denotes data dependencies between the NNs. RLHF complicates the dataflow by expanding each node into a distributed LLM training or generation program, and each edge into a many-to-many multicast. Traditional RL frameworks execute the dataflow using a single controller to instruct both intra-node computation and inter-node communication, which can be inefficient in RLHF due to large control dispatch overhead for distributed intra-node computation. Existing RLHF systems adopt a multi-controller paradigm, which can be inflexible due to nesting distributed computation and data communication. We propose HybridFlow, which combines single-controller and multi-controller paradigms in a hybrid manner to enable flexible representation and efficient execution of the RLHF data flow. We carefully design a set of hierarchical APIs that decouple and encapsulate computation and data dependencies in the complex RLHF dataflow, allowing efficient operation orchestration to implement RLHF algorithms and flexible mapping of the computation onto various devices. We further design a 3D-HybridEngine for efficient actor model resharding between training and generation phases, with zero memory redundancy and significantly reduced communication overhead. Our experimental results demonstrate 1.53x~20.57× throughput improvement when running various RLHF algorithms using HybridFlow, as compared with state-of-the-art baselines. HybridFlow source code is available at https://github.com/volcengine/verl
papers.abstract_zh: 来自人类反馈的强化学习 (RLHF) 广泛应用于大型语言模型 (LLM) 对齐中。传统的强化学习可以建模为数据流，其中每个节点代表神经网络 (NN) 的计算，每条边表示 NN 之间的数据依赖关系。 RLHF 通过将每个节点扩展为分布式 LLM 训练或生成程序，并将每个边缘扩展为多对多多播，使数据流变得复杂。传统的 RL 框架使用单个控制器执行数据流来指示节点内计算和节点间通信，由于分布式节点内计算的控制调度开销较大，这在 RLHF 中效率较低。现有的RLHF系统采用多控制器范式，由于嵌套的分布式计算和数据通信，该范式可能不灵活。我们提出了 HybridFlow，它以混合方式结合了单控制器和多控制器范例，以实现 RLHF 数据流的灵活表示和高效执行。我们精心设计了一组分层 API，将复杂的 RLHF 数据流中的计算和数据依赖关系解耦和封装，从而允许高效的操作编排来实现 RLHF 算法，并将计算灵活映射到各种设备上。我们进一步设计了一个 3D-HybridEngine，用于在训练和生成阶段之间进行高效的参与者模型重新分片，具有零内存冗余并显着减少了通信开销。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，使用 HybridFlow 运行各种 RLHF 算法时，吞吐量提高了 1.53 倍~20.57 倍。 HybridFlow 源代码位于 https://github.com/volcengine/verl

papers.title: HyperAlloc: Efficient VM Memory De/Inflation via Hypervisor-Shared Page-Frame Allocators.
papers.abstract: The provisioning of the right amount of DRAM to virtual machines (VMs) is still a major challenge and cost driver in virtualization settings. Many VMs run applications with highly volatile memory demands, which either leads to massive overprovisioning in low-demand phases or poor QoS in high-demand phases. Memory hotplugging and ballooning have become established techniques (in Linux/KVM available via virtio-mem and virtio-balloon) to dynamically de/inflate the physical memory of a VM cooperatively, by having the guests give back unused memory to the hypervisor. However, current VM deflation techniques are either not DMA-safe, preventing the passthrough of important devices like GPUs or NICs, or are not flexible or fast enough to cope with the frequently changing demands of the guest.
papers.abstract_zh: 向虚拟机 (VM) 提供适量的 DRAM 仍然是虚拟化设置中的主要挑战和成本驱动因素。许多虚拟机运行的应用程序具有高度易失性的内存需求，这要么导致低需求阶段的大量过度配置，要么导致高需求阶段的 QoS 较差。内存热插拔和气球膨胀已成为成熟的技术（在 Linux/KVM 中可通过 virtio-mem 和 virtio-balloon 实现），通过让来宾将未使用的内存返还给虚拟机管理程序，动态地动态减少/膨胀 VM 的物理内存。然而，当前的 VM 压缩技术要么不是 DMA 安全的，从而阻止了 GPU 或 NIC 等重要设备的直通，要么不够灵活或不够快，无法满足来宾频繁变化的需求。

papers.title: Impeller: Stream Processing on Shared Logs.
papers.abstract: Current stream processing systems provide exactly-once semantics using checkpointing or a combination of logging and checkpointing. These approaches can introduce high overhead, significantly increasing the latency for normal stream processing because maintaining exactly-once semantics requires coordination across distributed nodes and streams to capture a globally consistent state. We observe that modern distributed shared logs offer a promising solution for maintaining exactly-once semantics with a small overhead. We propose Impeller, a stream processing system that uses a distributed shared log for data storage and exactly-once processing. To maintain exactly-once semantics, Impeller includes a novel and efficient progress marking protocol based on string tags and selective reads in a shared log. The key idea is to leverage the log's record-tagging feature to atomically mark progress across all streams. The experiments over the NEXMark benchmark show that Impeller achieves 1.3× to 5.4× lower p50 latency, or 1.3× to 5.0× higher saturation throughput than Kafka Streams.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的流处理系统使用检查点或日志记录和检查点的组合提供一次性语义。这些方法可能会带来很高的开销，显着增加正常流处理的延迟，因为维护一次性语义需要跨分布式节点和流进行协调以捕获全局一致的状态。我们观察到，现代分布式共享日志提供了一种有前途的解决方案，可以以较小的开销维护一次语义。我们提出了 Impeller，一种使用分布式共享日志进行数据存储和一次性处理的流处理系统。为了维护一次性语义，Impeller 包含了一种新颖且高效的进度标记协议，该协议基于字符串标签和共享日志中的选择性读取。关键思想是利用日志的记录标记功能来自动标记所有流的进度。 NEXMark 基准测试的实验表明，与 Kafka Streams 相比，Impeller 的 p50 延迟降低了 1.3 倍到 5.4 倍，饱和吞吐量提高了 1.3 倍到 5.0 倍。

papers.title: Improving GPU Sharing Performance through Adaptive Bubbleless Spatial-Temporal Sharing.
papers.abstract: Data centers now allow multiple applications that have lightweight workloads to share a GPU. Existing temporal or spatial sharing systems struggle to provide efficient and accurate quota assignments. We observe that the performance of the multi-user system is often underestimated because of the existence of unused GPU "bubbles" and can be enhanced by squeezing the bubbles. Based on this observation, we design Bless, a bubble-less spatial-temporal sharing GPU system that fine-tunes the GPU resource allocation to improve multi-user performance. Bless leverages precise computing resource management and fine-grained kernel scheduling to ensure stringent quota guarantees and reduce latency fairly for applications with varying GPU quotas. We implement and evaluate Bless with multiple applications and workloads. Our result shows that Bless achieves 21.1% - 37.3% average latency reduction over the state-of-the-art while guaranteeing the promised quota for all applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据中心现在允许多个具有轻量级工作负载的应用程序共享 GPU。现有的时间或空间共享系统难以提供高效且准确的配额分配。我们观察到，由于存在未使用的 GPU“气泡”，多用户系统的性能常常被低估，并且可以通过挤压气泡来增强性能。基于这一观察，我们设计了 Bless，一种无气泡时空共享 GPU 系统，可以微调 GPU 资源分配以提高多用户性能。 Bless 利用精确的计算资源管理和细粒度的内核调度来确保严格的配额保证，并公平地减少具有不同 GPU 配额的应用程序的延迟。我们使用多个应用程序和工作负载来实施和评估 Bless。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，Bless 的平均延迟降低了 21.1% - 37.3%，同时保证了所有应用程序的承诺配额。

papers.title: Introspective Congestion Control for Consistent High Performance.
papers.abstract: The congestion control (CC) algorithm is expected to achieve consistent high performance under different network environments. Traditionally, classic CCs are designed with the methodology of inferring path conditions to guide the rate adjustment. However, this methodology suffers from wrong path condition inferences in certain cases, which mislead the rate adjustment and lead to performance degradation. To avoid wrong path condition inferences, we develop the projection-based introspective method and design the introspective congestion control (ICC) algorithm in this paper. Specifically, the rate adjustment rules are designed to possess a specialized profile such that the projection of the profile can be distinguished under unchanged path conditions. In this way, the projection, which can be distinguished from the time series of delay signals in the frequency domain, facilitates ICC to extract more information for path condition inferences. Consequently, with the introspection on the projection, ICC can avoid being misled by wrong path condition inferences and thus achieve consistent high performance under different conditions. The advantages of ICC are confirmed through extensive experiments conducted on various locally emulated scenarios, global testbeds over the Internet, and the Alipay platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制（CC）算法有望在不同的网络环境下实现一致的高性能。传统上，经典的CC是通过推断路径条件来指导速率调整的方法来设计的。然而，这种方法在某些情况下会受到错误的路径条件推断，从而误导速率调整并导致性能下降。为了避免错误的路径条件推断，我们在本文中开发了基于投影的内省方法并设计了内省拥塞控制（ICC）算法。具体地，速率调整规则被设计为具有专门的轮廓，使得在不变的路径条件下可以区分轮廓的投影。这样，可以与频域延迟信号的时间序列区分开来的投影，有利于ICC提取更多信息用于路径条件推断。因此，通过对投影的内省，ICC可以避免被错误的路径条件推断所误导，从而在不同条件下获得一致的高性能。通过在各种本地模拟场景、互联网全球测试平台和支付宝平台上进行的大量实验，证实了 ICC 的优势。

papers.title: JABAS: Joint Adaptive Batching and Automatic Scaling for DNN Training on Heterogeneous GPUs.
papers.abstract: Adaptive batching is a promising technique to reduce the communication and synchronization overhead for training Deep Neural Network (DNN) models. In this paper, we study how to speed up the training of a DNN model using adaptive batching, without degrading the convergence performance in a heterogeneous GPU cluster. We propose a novel DNN training system, called JABAS (Joint Adaptive Batching and Automatic Scaling). In JABAS, a DNN training job is executed on a DNN training framework called IIDP, which provides the same theoretical convergence rate of distributed SGD in a heterogeneous GPU cluster. To maximize the performance of the job with adaptive batching, JABAS employs adaptive batching and automatic resource scaling jointly. JABAS changes a global batch size every p iterations in a fine-grained manner within an epoch, while auto-scaling to the best GPU allocation for the next epoch in a coarse-grained manner. Using three heterogeneous GPU clusters, we evaluate JABAS for seven DNN models including large language models. Our experimental results demonstrate that JABAS provides 33.3% shorter training time and 54.2% lower training cost than the state-of-the-art adaptive training techniques, on average, without any accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 自适应批处理是一种很有前途的技术，可以减少训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型的通信和同步开销。在本文中，我们研究如何使用自适应批处理加速 DNN 模型的训练，而不降低异构 GPU 集群中的收敛性能。我们提出了一种新颖的 DNN 训练系统，称为 JABAS（联合自适应批处理和自动缩放）。在 JABAS 中，DNN 训练作业在称为 IIDP 的 DNN 训练框架上执行，该框架提供与异构 GPU 集群中的分布式 SGD 相同的理论收敛速度。为了通过自适应批处理最大限度地提高作业性能，JABAS 联合采用自适应批处理和自动资源扩展。 JABAS 在一个时期内以细粒度的方式每 p 次迭代更改全局批量大小，同时以粗粒度的方式自动缩放到下一个时期的最佳 GPU 分配。使用三个异构 GPU 集群，我们评估了七个 DNN 模型（包括大型语言模型）的 JABAS。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的自适应训练技术相比，JABAS 的训练时间平均缩短了 33.3%，训练成本降低了 54.2%，且没有任何准确性损失。

papers.title: Jupiter: Pushing Speed and Scalability Limitations for Subgraph Matching on Multi-GPUs.
papers.abstract: Graph pattern matching (GPM) aims to find subgraphs isomorphic to user-specified patterns within a large graph. Due to its ability to reveal potential relationships among entities in complex networks, it is widely applied in various fields, such as mining molecular structures in bioinformatics, detecting fraud in cloud-based e-commerce, and querying knowledge graphs in large language model. The explosion of data brought by the AI era has rendered traditional GPM systems inadequate for real-world needs. Due to the intricate data dependencies of GPM tasks, most SOTA GPM systems currently have limited scalability and performance, they perform well in small graph mining with single node but cannot scale to modern clusters with GPU acceleration. This paper introduces JUPITER, the first system capable of matching patterns on large graph across multi-node GPU clusters, which can handle graphs 10 times larger than SOTAs with the same memory resources. Its core principle is to delegate computation to the data-residing processing unit rather than pulling data to the computation location, which greatly improves communication efficiency. Experimental results show that JUPITER can reduce communication volume by two orders of magnitude compared to SOTA subgraph matching systems, achieving up to 120× speedup and an average of 21.5× speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 图模式匹配（GPM）旨在在大图中找到与用户指定模式同构的子图。由于其能够揭示复杂网络中实体之间的潜在关系，因此被广泛应用于各个领域，例如生物信息学中的分子结构挖掘、基于云的电子商务中的欺诈检测以及大语言模型中的知识图查询。人工智能时代带来的数据爆炸使得传统的GPM系统无法满足现实世界的需求。由于GPM任务复杂的数据依赖性，目前大多数SOTA GPM系统的可扩展性和性能有限，它们在单节点的小图挖掘中表现良好，但无法扩展到具有GPU加速的现代集群。本文介绍了 JUPITER，这是第一个能够跨多节点 GPU 集群在大型图上进行模式匹配的系统，在相同的内存资源下，它可以处理比 SOTA 大 10 倍的图。其核心原理是将计算委托给驻留数据的处理单元，而不是将数据拉到计算位置，这大大提高了通信效率。实验结果表明，与SOTA子图匹配系统相比，JUPITER可以将通信量减少两个数量级，实现高达120倍的加速，平均21.5倍的加速。

papers.title: Ladon: High-Performance Multi-BFT Consensus via Dynamic Global Ordering.
papers.abstract: Multi-BFT consensus runs multiple leader-based consensus instances in parallel, circumventing the leader bottleneck of a single instance. However, it contains an Achilles' heel: the need to globally order output blocks across instances. Deriving this global ordering is challenging because it must cope with different rates at which blocks are produced by instances. Prior Multi-BFT designs assign each block a global index before creation, leading to poor performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 多 BFT 共识并行运行多个基于 Leader 的共识实例，规避了单个实例的 Leader 瓶颈。然而，它有一个致命弱点：需要跨实例对输出块进行全局排序。导出这种全局排序具有挑战性，因为它必须应对实例生成块的不同速率。先前的 Multi-BFT 设计在创建之前为每个块分配一个全局索引，导致性能不佳。

papers.title: LOFT: A Lock-free and Adaptive Learned Index with High Scalability for Dynamic Workloads.
papers.abstract: In order to mitigate memory overheads and reduce data movements in the critical path, a computational and space-efficient learned index is promising to deliver high performance and complement traditional index structures, which unfortunately works well only in static workloads. In dynamic workloads, the learned indexes incur performance degradation with poor scalability due to inefficient data placement for newly inserted items and intensive lock contention. Furthermore, the model retraining is time-consuming and blocking, which hampers the performance of index operations. In order to meet the needs of dynamic workloads and efficient retraining, we propose LOFT, a highly scalable and adaptive learned index with lock-free design and self-tuning retraining technique to provide high throughput and low latency. LOFT enables all index operations to be concurrently executed in a lock-free manner by using Compare-and-Swap (CAS) primitive and an expanded learned bucket to handle the overflowed data. To minimize the impact of model retraining, LOFT leverages a shadow node to serve the clients' requests and accelerates the retraining process with the aid of index operations. To accommodate dynamic workloads, LOFT determines when and how to perform retraining based on inferred access patterns. Our extensive evaluation on YCSB and real-world workloads demonstrates that LOFT effectively improves the performance by up to 14× than state-of-the-art designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了减轻内存开销并减少关键路径中的数据移动，计算和空间高效的学习索引有望提供高性能并补充传统索引结构，不幸的是，传统索引结构仅在静态工作负载中运行良好。在动态工作负载中，由于新插入项的数据放置效率低下和密集的锁争用，学习索引会导致性能下降和可扩展性差。此外，模型重新训练非常耗时且阻塞，这会影响索引操作的性能。为了满足动态工作负载和高效再训练的需求，我们提出了LOFT，一种高度可扩展和自适应的学习索引，具有无锁设计和自调整再训练技术，以提供高吞吐量和低延迟。 LOFT 通过使用比较和交换（CAS）原语和扩展学习桶来处理溢出数据，使所有索引操作能够以无锁方式并发执行。为了最大限度地减少模型重新训练的影响，LOFT利用影子节点来服务客户的请求，并借助索引操作加速重新训练过程。为了适应动态工作负载，LOFT 根据推断的访问模式确定何时以及如何执行重新训练。我们对 YCSB 和实际工作负载的广泛评估表明，LOFT 有效地将性能比最先进的设计提高了 14 倍。

papers.title: Marlin: Enabling High-Throughput Congestion Control Testing in Large-Scale Networks.
papers.abstract: Cloud providers require high-throughput traffic to test the effectiveness of congestion control (CC) configurations (i.e., CC algorithm selection and their parameter settings) in networks. A network tester capable of evaluating CC configurations needs to fulfill the following requirements: (R1) Capable of generating traffic with CC behaviors. (R2) Ability to customize CC algorithms. (R3) High throughput CC traffic generation. However, existing network testers fail to meet these requirements simultaneously. The paper presents Marlin, a novel high-throughput network tester designed for CC evaluation. Marlin leverages a high-throughput, low-programmability device to amplify the traffic generated by a low-throughput, high-programmability device. The low-throughput device is responsible for complex computational tasks, such as running CC and flow scheduling algorithms, and communicates with the high-throughput device at a high frequency using small packets to instruct it to generate high-throughput traffic with CC behaviors. This hybrid approach allows for customizable, high-throughput CC testing. Our experiments demonstrate that Marlin can accurately emulate CC behaviors and replicate real-world scenarios. Marlin can generate 1.2 Tbps of CC traffic using a single programmable switch pipeline and one 100 Gbps port of an FPGA NIC, supporting up to 65,536 concurrent flows.
papers.abstract_zh: 云提供商需要高吞吐量流量来测试网络中拥塞控制 (CC) 配置（即 CC 算法选择及其参数设置）的有效性。能够评估 CC 配置的网络测试仪需要满足以下要求： (R1) 能够生成具有 CC 行为的流量。 (R2) 能够定制CC算法。 (R3) 高吞吐量 CC 流量生成。然而，现有的网络测试仪无法同时满足这些要求。本文介绍了 Marlin，一种专为 CC 评估而设计的新型高吞吐量网络测试仪。 Marlin 利用高吞吐量、低可编程性设备来放大低吞吐量、高可编程性设备生成的流量。低吞吐量设备负责复杂的计算任务，例如运行CC和流调度算法，并使用小数据包与高吞吐量设备进行高频通信，指示其通过CC行为生成高吞吐量流量。这种混合方法允许进行可定制的高通量 CC 测试。我们的实验表明，Marlin 可以准确地模拟 CC 行为并复制现实世界的场景。 Marlin 可以使用单个可编程交换机管道和 FPGA NIC 的一个 100 Gbps 端口生成 1.2 Tbps 的 CC 流量，支持多达 65,536 个并发流。

papers.title: MEPipe: Democratizing LLM Training with Memory-Efficient Slice-Level Pipeline Scheduling on Cost-Effective Accelerators.
papers.abstract: The training of large language models (LLMs) typically needs costly GPUs, such as NVIDIA A100 or H100. They possess substantial high-bandwidth on-chip memory and rapid interconnects like NVLinks. The exorbitant expenses associated with LLM training pose not just an economic challenge but also a societal one, as it restricts the ability to train LLMs from scratch to a selected few organizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的训练通常需要昂贵的 GPU，例如 NVIDIA A100 或 H100。它们拥有大量高带宽片上存储器和 NVLink 等快速互连。与法学硕士培训相关的高昂费用不仅带来了经济挑战，而且还带来了社会挑战，因为它限制了从零开始向选定的少数组织培训法学硕士的能力。

papers.title: MetaHG: Enhancing HGNN Systems Leveraging Advanced Metapath Graph Abstraction.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks (HGNNs) are pivotal for extracting semantic and structural information from heterogeneous graphs. Traditional HGNN implementations often grapple with the challenges of excessive metapath instances, requiring substantial storage or incurring high instance-matching overhead. These methods typically suffer from redundant instance encoding and costly semantic graph construction. Addressing these issues, we introduce an advanced Metapath Graph (MG) abstraction that encapsulates the structural information of all metapath instances within a compact representation. This approach significantly reduces storage demands, eliminates redundant instance encodings, and foregoes the need for constructing semantic graphs, thereby facilitating rapid HGNN inference. Our software-based system, MetaHG, leverages layerwise encoding and aggregation to avoid redundancies without the necessity of semantic graphs. It incorporates a fast, lightweight partitioning method to efficiently manage large graphs. Distinctively, MetaHG seamlessly integrates with both dynamic HGNNs and homogeneous GNNs, unlike conventional systems. Comparative evaluations demonstrate that MetaHG surpasses the state-of-the-art BFS- and DFS-based HGNN systems, MAGNN and the software implementation of MetaNMP, by 42.5× and 4.53×, respectively, on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 异构图神经网络（HGNN）对于从异构图中提取语义和结构信息至关重要。传统的 HGNN 实现经常面临元路径实例过多的挑战，需要大量存储或产生较高的实例匹配开销。这些方法通常遭受冗余实例编码和昂贵的语义图构建的困扰。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了高级元路径图（MG）抽象，它将所有元路径实例的结构信息封装在一个紧凑的表示中。这种方法显着减少了存储需求，消除了冗余的实例编码，并放弃了构建语义图的需要，从而促进了快速 HGNN 推理。我们基于软件的系统 MetaHG 利用分层编码和聚合来避免冗余，而无需语义图。它采用快速、轻量级的分区方法来有效管理大型图。与传统系统不同，MetaHG 与动态 HGNN 和同构 GNN 无缝集成。比较评估表明，MetaHG 平均分别超过了最先进的基于 BFS 和 DFS 的 HGNN 系统、MAGNN 和 MetaNMP 的软件实现 42.5 倍和 4.53 倍。

papers.title: Mist: Efficient Distributed Training of Large Language Models via Memory-Parallelism Co-Optimization.
papers.abstract: Various parallelism, such as data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism, along with memory optimizations like activation checkpointing, redundancy elimination, and offloading, have been proposed to accelerate distributed training for Large Language Models. To find the best combination of these techniques, automatic distributed training systems are proposed. However, existing systems only tune a subset of optimizations, due to the lack of overlap awareness, inability to navigate the vast search space, and ignoring the inter-microbatch imbalance, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address these shortcomings, we propose Mist, a memory, overlap, and imbalance-aware automatic distributed training system that comprehensively co-optimizes all memory footprint reduction techniques alongside parallelism. Mist is based on three key ideas: (1) fine-grained overlap-centric scheduling, orchestrating optimizations in an overlapped manner, (2) symbolic-based performance analysis that predicts runtime and memory usage using symbolic expressions for fast tuning, and (3) imbalance-aware hierarchical tuning, decoupling the process into an inter-stage imbalance and overlap aware Mixed Integer Linear Programming problem and an intra-stage Dual-Objective Constrained Optimization problem, and connecting them through Pareto frontier sampling. Our evaluation results show that Mist achieves an average of 1.28× (up to 1.73×) and 1.27× (up to 2.04×) speedup compared to state-of-the-art manual system Megatron-LM and state-of-the-art automatic system Aceso, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种并行性（例如数据、张量和管道并行性）以及内存优化（例如激活检查点、冗余消除和卸载）来加速大型语言模型的分布式训练。为了找到这些技术的最佳组合，提出了自动分布式训练系统。然而，由于缺乏重叠意识、无法导航巨大的搜索空间以及忽略微批次间的不平衡，现有系统仅调整优化的子集，从而导致性能次佳。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了 Mist，一种内存、重叠和不平衡感知的自动分布式训练系统，可全面共同优化所有内存占用减少技术以及并行性。 Mist 基于三个关键思想：(1) 以重叠为中心的细粒度调度，以重叠方式编排优化；(2) 基于符号的性能分析，使用符号表达式预测运行时和内存使用情况以进行快速调优；(3) 不平衡感知分层调优，将过程解耦为阶段间不平衡和重叠感知混合整数线性规划问题和阶段内双目标约束优化问题，并通过 Pareto 前沿采样将它们连接起来。我们的评估结果表明，与最先进的手动系统 Megatron-LM 和最先进的自动系统 Aceso 相比，Mist 分别实现了平均 1.28 倍（高达 1.73 倍）和 1.27 倍（高达 2.04 倍）的加速。

papers.title: Moko: Marrying Python with Big Data Systems.
papers.abstract: Python stands as the preferred language for data science, thanks to its user-friendly syntax and a robust ecosystem that effortlessly accommodates a variety of data types and workloads, such as relational/tabular data, tensors, and graphs. While Python thrives in smaller data settings, it struggles to scale in distributed big data environments. MOKO is an IR-based execution framework designed to extend Python's reach into the distributed big data domain by generating code that can utilize existing systems such as Spark, Dask, Torch, and GRAPE. Moko preserves Python's key features---interoperability, ease of use, and support for multi-model data types and workloads---while enabling efficient execution in a distributed setting. Our evaluation indicates that MOKO can accelerate Python applications by up to 11× across diverse systems, diminish data alignment overhead by 28×, and outperform hand-optimized solutions by 2.5×.
papers.abstract_zh: Python 因其用户友好的语法和强大的生态系统而成为数据科学的首选语言，可以轻松适应各种数据类型和工作负载，例如关系/表格数据、张量和图形。虽然 Python 在较小的数据环境中蓬勃发展，但它在分布式大数据环境中难以扩展。 MOKO 是一个基于 IR 的执行框架，旨在通过生成可利用 Spark、Dask、Torch 和 GRAPE 等现有系统的代码，将 Python 的影响力扩展到分布式大数据领域。 Moko 保留了 Python 的关键特性——互操作性、易用性以及对多模型数据类型和工作负载的支持——同时支持在分布式环境中高效执行。我们的评估表明，MOKO 可以在不同系统上将 Python 应用程序加速高达 11 倍，将数据对齐开销减少 28 倍，并且比手动优化的解决方案性能提高 2.5 倍。

papers.title: Multi-Grained Specifications for Distributed System Model Checking and Verification.
papers.abstract: This paper presents our experience specifying and verifying the correctness of ZooKeeper, a complex and evolving distributed coordination system. We use TLA+ to model finegrained behaviors of ZooKeeper and use the TLC model checker to verify its correctness properties; we also check conformance between the model and code. The fundamental challenge is to balance the granularity of specifications and the scalability of model checking---fine-grained specifications lead to state-space explosion, while coarse-grained specifications introduce model-code gaps. To address this challenge, we write specifications with different granularities for composable modules, and compose them into mixed-grained specifications based on specific scenarios. For example, to verify code changes, we compose fine-grained specifications of changed modules and coarse-grained specifications that abstract away details of unchanged code with preserved interactions. We show that writing multi-grained specifications is a viable practice and can cope with model-code gaps without untenable state space, especially for evolving software where changes are typically local and incremental. We detected six severe bugs that violate five types of invariants and verified their code fixes; the fixes have been merged to ZooKeeper. We also improve the protocol design to make it easy to implement correctly.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们指定和验证 ZooKeeper（一个复杂且不断发展的分布式协调系统）正确性的经验。我们使用 TLA+ 对 ZooKeeper 的细粒度行为进行建模，并使用 TLC 模型检查器来验证其正确性属性；我们还检查模型和代码之间的一致性。根本的挑战是平衡规范的粒度和模型检查的可扩展性——细粒度的规范会导致状态空间爆炸，而粗粒度的规范会引入模型代码间隙。为了应对这一挑战，我们为可组合模块编写不同粒度的规范，并根据具体场景将其组合成混合粒度的规范。例如，为了验证代码更改，我们编写了更改模块的细粒度规范和粗粒度规范，这些规范通过保留的交互抽象了未更改代码的细节。我们表明，编写多粒度规范是一种可行的实践，并且可以在没有无法维持的状态空间的情况下应对模型代码间隙，特别是对于通常是本地和增量变化的不断发展的软件。我们检测到了六个违反五种不变量的严重错误，并验证了它们的代码修复；这些修复已合并到 ZooKeeper 中。我们还改进了协议设计，使其易于正确实现。

papers.title: Multiplexing Dynamic Deep Learning Workloads with SLO-awareness in GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: Deep learning (DL) inference services are widely recognized as crucial workloads in large-scale cloud clusters. However, due to the stringent latency requirements, cloud providers often over-provision GPU resources, resulting in underutilization of the available GPU potential. Although co-locating tasks on the same device can enhance utilization, ensuring Service Level Objectives (SLOs) guarantees for multiplexing highly dynamic inference services becomes extremely challenging due to significant resource interference.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 推理服务被广泛认为是大规模云集群中的关键工作负载。然而，由于严格的延迟要求，云提供商经常过度配置 GPU 资源，导致可用 GPU 潜力的利用不足。尽管在同一设备上共置任务可以提高利用率，但由于严重的资源干扰，确保多路复用高度动态推理服务的服务级别目标 (SLO) 变得极具挑战性。

papers.title: NeuStream: Bridging Deep Learning Serving and Stream Processing.
papers.abstract: Modern Deep Neural Network (DNN) exhibits a pattern where multiple sub-models are executed, guided by control flows such as loops and switch/merge operations. This dynamic nature introduces complexities in batching the requests of such DNNs for efficient execution on GPUs. In this paper, we present NeuStream, a programming model and runtime system for serving deep learning workloads using stream processing. NeuStream decomposes the inference workflow into modules and forms them into a streaming processing system where a request flows through. Based on such abstraction, NeuStream is able to batch requests at fine-grained module granularity. To maximize serving goodput, NeuStream exploits a two-level scheduling approach to decide the best batching requests and resource allocation for each module while satisfying service level objectives (SLOs). Our evaluation of NeuStream on a set of modern DNNs like Large Language Models (LLM) and diffusion models, etc., shows that NeuStream significantly improves goodput compared to state-of-the-art DNN serving systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络 (DNN) 呈现出一种执行多个子模型的模式，由循环和切换/合并操作等控制流引导。这种动态特性带来了批处理此类 DNN 请求以在 GPU 上高效执行的复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了 NeuStream，一种编程模型和运行时系统，用于使用流处理来服务深度学习工作负载。 NeuStream将推理工作流程分解为模块，并将其形成请求流经的流处理系统。基于这样的抽象，NeuStream能够以细粒度的模块粒度对请求进行批处理。为了最大限度地提高服务吞吐量，NeuStream 利用两级调度方法来决定每个模块的最佳批处理请求和资源分配，同时满足服务级别目标 (SLO)。我们在一组现代 DNN（例如大型语言模型 (LLM) 和扩散模型等）上对 NeuStream 进行的评估表明，与最先进的 DNN 服务系统相比，NeuStream 显着提高了吞吐量。

papers.title: Occamy: A Preemptive Buffer Management for On-chip Shared-memory Switches.
papers.abstract: Today's high-speed switches employ an on-chip shared packet buffer. The buffer is becoming increasingly insufficient as it cannot scale with the growing switching capacity. Nonetheless, the buffer needs to face highly intense bursts and meet stringent performance requirements for datacenter applications. This imposes rigorous demand on the Buffer Management (BM) scheme, which dynamically allocates the buffer across queues. However, the de facto BM scheme, designed over two decades ago, is ill-suited to meet the requirements of today's network.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今的高速交换机采用片上共享数据包缓冲区。缓冲区变得越来越不足，因为它无法随着交换容量的增长而扩展。尽管如此，缓冲器需要面对高强度的突发并满足数据中心应用严格的性能要求。这对缓冲区管理（BM）方案提出了严格的要求，该方案跨队列动态分配缓冲区。然而，事实上的BM方案是二十多年前设计的，已经不能满足当今网络的要求。

papers.title: OHMiner: An Overlap-centric System for Efficient Hypergraph Pattern Mining.
papers.abstract: Hypergraph Pattern Mining (HPM) aims to identify all the instances of user-interested subhypergraphs (patterns) in hypergraphs, which has been widely used in various applications. However, existing solutions either need significant enumeration overhead because they extend subhypergraphs at the granularity of vertices, or suffer from massive redundant computations because they often need to repeatedly fetch and process the same incident hyperedges for different vertices. This paper presents an overlap-centric system named OHMiner to efficiently support HPM. OHMiner proposes an overlap-centric execution model to determine the subhypergraphs isomorphism through computing and comparing overlaps among hyperedges using set operations.
