This model aims to efficiently handle the vertices that collectively share the same incident hyperedges. To automatically and precisely retrieve an arbitrary pattern's overlapping semantics without performing redundant set computations, OHMiner further proposes a redundancy-free compiler, which constructs an Overlap Intersection Graph (OIG) for the pattern, optimizes the OIG, and generates an overlap-centric execution plan to guide the procedure of HPM. Moreover, OHMiner designs an overlap-centric parallel execution engine, which adopts an incremental overlap-pruned approach to fast validate candidates for HPM. Additionally, it proposes a degree-aware data store to support efficient generation of candidates. Through evaluating OHMiner on a broad range of real-world hypergraphs with various patterns, our experimental results show that OHMiner outperforms the state-of-the-art HPM system by 5.4×-22.2×.
papers.abstract_zh: 超图模式挖掘（HPM）旨在识别超图中用户感兴趣的子超图（模式）的所有实例，已广泛应用于各种应用中。然而，现有的解决方案要么需要大量的枚举开销，因为它们以顶点的粒度扩展子超图，要么遭受大量冗余计算，因为它们经常需要重复获取和处理不同顶点的相同事件超边。本文提出了一个名为 OHMiner 的以重叠为中心的系统，以有效支持 HPM。 OHMiner 提出了一种以重叠为中心的执行模型，通过使用集合运算计算和比较超边之间的重叠来确定子超图同构。该模型旨在有效地处理共同共享相同事件超边的顶点。为了在不执行冗余集合计算的情况下自动精确地检索任意模式的重叠语义，OHMiner 进一步提出了一种无冗余编译器，它为该模式构造重叠交集图（OIG），优化 OIG，并生成以重叠为中心的执行计划来指导 HPM 的过程。此外，OHMiner 设计了一个以重叠为中心的并行执行引擎，它采用增量重叠修剪方法来快速验证 HPM 的候选者。此外，它还提出了一个学位感知数据存储来支持高效生成候选人。通过在具有各种模式的广泛现实世界超图上评估 OHMiner，我们的实验结果表明，OHMiner 的性能比最先进的 HPM 系统高出 5.4×-22.2×。

papers.title: Optimizing Task Scheduling in Cloud VMs with Accurate vCPU Abstraction.
papers.abstract: The paper shows that task scheduling in Cloud VMs hasn't evolved quickly to handle the dynamic vCPU resources. The existing vCPU abstraction cannot accurately depict the vCPU dynamics in capacity, activity, and topology, and these mismatches can mislead the scheduler, causing performance degradation and system anomalies. The paper proposes a novel solution, vSched, which probes accurate vCPU abstraction through a set of lightweight microbenchmarks (vProbers) without modifying the hypervisor, and leverages the probed information to optimize task scheduling in cloud VMs with three new techniques: biased vCPU selection, intra-VM harvesting, and relaxed work conservation. Our evaluation of vSched's implementation in x86 Linux Kernel demonstrates that it can effectively improve both system throughput and workload latency across various VM types in the dynamic multi-cloud environment.
papers.abstract_zh: 该论文表明，云虚拟机中的任务调度尚未快速发展以处理动态 vCPU 资源。现有的 vCPU 抽象无法准确描述 vCPU 的容量、活动和拓扑动态，这些不匹配可能会误导调度程序，导致性能下降和系统异常。本文提出了一种新颖的解决方案 vSched，它通过一组轻量级微基准测试 (vProbers) 来探测准确的 vCPU 抽象，而无需修改虚拟机管理程序，并利用探测到的信息通过三种新技术来优化云虚拟机中的任务调度：偏向 vCPU 选择、虚拟机内部收获和宽松的工作保护。我们对 x86 Linux 内核中 vSched 实施的评估表明，它可以有效提高动态多云环境中各种虚拟机类型的系统吞吐量和工作负载延迟。

papers.title: Overcoming the Last Mile between Log-Structured File Systems and Persistent Memory via Scatter Logging.
papers.abstract: Log-structured file system (LFS) has been a popular option for persistent memory (PM) for its high write performance and lightweight crash consistency protocols. However, even with PM's byte-addressable I/O interface, existing PM LFSes still maintain contiguous space for log locality while using heavy garbage collection (GC) to synchronously reclaim space, causing up to 50% I/O performance degradation on PM. Thus, there exists a last-mile problem between the contiguous space management of LFS (that induces GC) and the non-contiguous byte-addressability of PM.
papers.abstract_zh: 日志结构文件系统 (LFS) 因其高写入性能和轻量级崩溃一致性协议而成为持久内存 (PM) 的流行选择。然而，即使使用 PM 的字节可寻址 I/O 接口，现有的 PM LFS 仍然为日志局部性维护连续的空间，同时使用大量垃圾收集 (GC) 同步回收空间，导致 PM 上的 I/O 性能下降高达 50%。因此，LFS的连续空间管理（引发GC）和PM的非连续字节寻址之间存在最后一英里问题。

papers.title: ParallelEVM: Operation-Level Concurrent Transaction Execution for EVM-Compatible Blockchains.
papers.abstract: Blockchain systems, especially EVM-compatible ones that serially execute transactions, face a significant limitation in throughput. One promising solution is concurrent transaction execution, which accelerates transaction processing and increases the overall throughput. However, existing concurrency control algorithms fail to obtain adequate speedups in high-contention blockchain workloads, primarily due to their transaction-level conflict resolution strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 区块链系统，尤其是串行执行交易的 EVM 兼容系统，在吞吐量方面面临着重大限制。一种有前途的解决方案是并发事务执行，它可以加速事务处理并提高总体吞吐量。然而，现有的并发控制算法无法在高争用的区块链工作负载中获得足够的加速，这主要是由于其事务级冲突解决策略。

papers.title: Pegasus: Transparent and Unified Kernel-Bypass Networking for Fast Local and Remote Communication.
papers.abstract: Modern software architectures in cloud computing are highly reliant on interconnected local and remote services. Popular architectures, such as the service mesh, rely on the use of independent services or sidecars for a single application. While such modular approaches simplify application development and deployment, they also introduce significant communication overhead since now even local communication that is handled by the kernel becomes a performance bottleneck. This problem has been identified and partially solved for remote communication over fast NICs through the use of kernel-bypass data plane systems. However, existing kernel-bypass mechanisms challenge their practical deployment by either requiring code modification or supporting only a small subset of the network interface.
papers.abstract_zh: 云计算中的现代软件架构高度依赖互连的本地和远程服务。流行的架构（例如服务网格）依赖于单个应用程序使用独立服务或 sidecar。虽然这种模块化方法简化了应用程序开发和部署，但它们也引入了显着的通信开销，因为现在即使由内核处理的本地通信也成为性能瓶颈。通过使用内核旁路数据平面系统，通过快速 NIC 进行远程通信时，已发现并部分解决了该问题。然而，现有的内核绕过机制需要修改代码或仅支持网络接口的一小部分，从而对它们的实际部署提出了挑战。

papers.title: PET: Proactive Demotion for Efficient Tiered Memory Management.
papers.abstract: Tiered memory is a promising approach for increasing main-memory capacity at a lower cost by using DRAM as the upper tier (fast memory) and slower-but-cheap byte-addressable memory as the lower tier (slow memory). A proactive demotion, one of the ways to use tiered memory efficiently, demotes cold data to slow memory even when fast memory has sufficient free space. Prior works have utilized proactive demotion to reduce the high cost of main memory by reducing applications' resident set size in fast memory. Further, proactive demotion helps mitigate severe performance degradation caused by fast memory shortages when there is a spike in demand for hot data. Still, we observe that leveraging memory access locality within the allocation units of applications enables larger fast-memory savings with lower system overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 分层内存是一种很有前途的方法，通过使用 DRAM 作为上层（快速内存），使用较慢但便宜的字节可寻址内存作为下层（慢速内存），以较低的成本增加主内存容量。主动降级是有效使用分层内存的方法之一，即使快速内存有足够的可用空间，也会将冷数据降级为慢速内存。先前的工作已经利用主动降级来通过减少应用程序在快速存储器中的驻留集大小来降低主存储器的高成本。此外，当热数据需求激增时，主动降级有助于缓解由于快速内存短缺而导致的严重性能下降。尽管如此，我们仍然观察到，利用应用程序分配单元内的内存访问局部性可以以更低的系统开销实现更大的快速内存节省。

papers.title: Phantom: Virtualizing Switch Register Resources for Accurate Sketch-based Network Measurement.
papers.abstract: Sketches have proven to be useful for measuring traffic. They store measurement results in the registers of data plane switches. However, they suffer from the short of switch register resources, limiting their measurement accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 事实证明，草图对于测量流量非常有用。它们将测量结果存储在数据平面交换机的寄存器中。然而，它们缺乏开关寄存器资源，限制了它们的测量精度。

papers.title: Pre-Stores: Proactive Software-guided Movement of Data Down the Memory Hierarchy.
papers.abstract: International audience
papers.abstract_zh: 国际观众

papers.title: Rakis: Secure Fast I/O Primitives Across Trust Boundaries on Intel SGX.
papers.abstract: The use of Intel® Software Guard Extensions (SGX) offers robust security measures for shielding applications in untrusted environments. However, the performance overhead experienced by IO-intensive applications within SGX limits widespread adoption. Prior approaches have proposed the use of userspace kernel-bypass libraries such as Data Plane Development Kit (DPDK) inside SGX enclaves to enable direct access to IO devices. However, these solutions often come at the cost of increasing the Trusted Computing Base (TCB) size, expanding the attack surface, and complicating deployment. In this paper, we introduce Rakis, a comprehensive system that securely enables SGX enclave programs to leverage fast IO Linux kernel primitives without modifying user applications. Rakis prioritizes the security of its TCB components by employing rigorous software testing and verification methods, embodying a security-by-design approach. Importantly, Rakis achieves performance advantages without sacrificing TCB size or introducing deployment intricacies and demonstrates significant improvements in benchmark tests with a 4.6x increase in UDP network throughput compared to state-of-the-art SGX enclave LibOS (Gramine-SGX). To demonstrate the practical applicability of Rakis, we evaluate its performance on four real-world programs showcasing an average performance improvement of 2.8x compared to Gramine-SGX across all workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 英特尔® Software Guard Extensions (SGX) 的使用提供了强大的安全措施，可在不受信任的环境中保护应用程序。然而，SGX 内 IO 密集型应用程序所经历的性能开销限制了广泛采用。先前的方法建议在 SGX enclave 内使用用户空间内核旁路库，例如数据平面开发套件 (DPDK)，以实现对 IO 设备的直接访问。然而，这些解决方案通常以增加可信计算库 (TCB) 规模、扩大攻击面和使部署复杂化为代价。在本文中，我们介绍了 Rakis，这是一个综合系统，可以安全地使 SGX enclave 程序利用快速 IO Linux 内核原语，而无需修改用户应用程序。 Rakis 通过采用严格的软件测试和验证方法，体现安全设计方法，优先考虑 TCB 组件的安全性。重要的是，Rakis 在不牺牲 TCB 大小或引入复杂部署的情况下实现了性能优势，并且在基准测试中表现出显着改进，与最先进的 SGX enclave LibOS (Gramine-SGX) 相比，UDP 网络吞吐量提高了 4.6 倍。为了证明 Rakis 的实际适用性，我们在四个实际程序中评估了它的性能，结果表明，与 Gramine-SGX 相比，所有工作负载的平均性能提高了 2.8 倍。

papers.title: Revealing the Unstable Foundations of eBPF-Based Kernel Extensions.
papers.abstract: eBPF programs significantly enhance kernel capabilities, but encounter substantial compatibility challenges due to their deep integration with unstable kernel internals. We introduce DepSurf, a tool that identifies dependency mismatches between eBPF programs and kernel images. Our analysis of 25 kernel images spanning 8 years reveals that dependency mismatches are pervasive, stemming from kernel source code evolution, diverse configuration options, and intricate compilation processes. We apply DepSurf to 53 real-world eBPF programs, and find that 83% are impacted by dependency mismatches, underscoring the urgent need for systematic dependency analysis. By identifying these mismatches, DepSurf enables a more robust development and maintenance process for eBPF programs, enhancing their reliability across a wide range of kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: eBPF 程序显着增强了内核功能，但由于它们与不稳定的内核内部深度集成，因此遇到了巨大的兼容性挑战。我们引入了 DepSurf，这是一个识别 eBPF 程序和内核映像之间依赖关系不匹配的工具。我们对跨越 8 年的 25 个内核映像的分析表明，依赖项不匹配非常普遍，这源于内核源代码的演变、多样化的配置选项和复杂的编译过程。我们将 DepSurf 应用于 53 个现实世界的 eBPF 程序，发现 83% 受到依赖项不匹配的影响，这凸显了系统依赖项分析的迫切需要。通过识别这些不匹配，DepSurf 为 eBPF 程序提供了更强大的开发和维护流程，从而增强了它们在各种内核中的可靠性。

papers.title: RoboRebound: Multi-Robot System Defense with Bounded-Time Interaction.
papers.abstract: Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) is a classic technique for defending distributed systems against a wide range of faults and attacks. However, existing solutions are designed for systems where nodes can interact only by exchanging messages. They are not directly applicable to systems where nodes have sensors and actuators and can also interact in the physical world - perhaps by blocking each other's path or by crashing into each other.
papers.abstract_zh: 拜占庭容错（BFT）是一种保护分布式系统免受各种故障和攻击的经典技术。然而，现有的解决方案是为节点只能通过交换消息进行交互的系统而设计的。它们并不直接适用于节点具有传感器和执行器的系统，并且还可以在物理世界中进行交互——可能通过阻塞彼此的路径或相互碰撞。

papers.title: Samoyeds: Accelerating MoE Models with Structured Sparsity Leveraging Sparse Tensor Cores.
papers.abstract: The escalating size of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based Large Language Models (LLMs) presents significant computational and memory challenges, necessitating innovative solutions to enhance efficiency without compromising model accuracy. Structured sparsity emerges as a compelling strategy to address these challenges by leveraging the emerging sparse computing hardware. Prior works mainly focus on the sparsity in model parameters, neglecting the inherent sparse patterns in activations. This oversight can lead to additional computational costs associated with activations, potentially resulting in suboptimal performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于专家混合 (MoE) 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的规模不断扩大，带来了巨大的计算和内存挑战，需要创新的解决方案来提高效率而不影响模型的准确性。结构化稀疏性成为一种引人注目的策略，可以利用新兴的稀疏计算硬件来应对这些挑战。先前的工作主要关注模型参数的稀疏性，忽略了激活中固有的稀疏模式。这种疏忽可能会导致与激活相关的额外计算成本，从而可能导致性能不佳。

papers.title: Seal: Towards Diverse Specification Inference for Linux Interfaces from Security Patches.
papers.abstract: Linux utilizes interfaces as communication protocols across different subsystems while ensuring manageability. These interfaces standardize interactions between various subsystems; however, the absence of complete calling contexts can result in the mishandling of data from other entities, i.e., interaction data, thus incurring vulnerabilities. Even worse, the effectiveness of static bug detectors could be severely hindered due to the lack of interface specifications. Previous solutions, seeking to automate the inference of interface specifications, are tailored to a subset of the interaction data behavior and, hence are deficient in generalizability.
papers.abstract_zh: Linux 利用接口作为不同子系统之间的通信协议，同时确保可管理性。这些接口标准化了各个子系统之间的交互；然而，缺乏完整的调用上下文可能会导致对来自其他实体的数据（即交互数据）的错误处理，从而导致漏洞。更糟糕的是，由于缺乏接口规范，静态错误检测器的有效性可能会受到严重阻碍。以前的解决方案寻求自动化接口规范的推断，是针对交互数据行为的子集定制的，因此缺乏通用性。

papers.title: SeBS-Flow: Benchmarking Serverless Cloud Function Workflows.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing has emerged as a prominent paradigm, with a significant adoption rate among cloud customers. While this model offers advantages such as abstraction from the deployment and resource scheduling, it also poses limitations in handling complex use cases due to the restricted nature of individual functions. Serverless workflows address this limitation by orchestrating multiple functions into a cohesive application. However, existing serverless workflow platforms exhibit significant differences in their programming models and infrastructure, making fair and consistent performance evaluations difficult in practice. To address this gap, we propose the first serverless workflow benchmarking suite SeBS-Flow, providing a platform-agnostic workflow model that enables consistent benchmarking across various platforms. SeBS-Flow includes six real-world application benchmarks and four microbenchmarks representing different computational patterns. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on three major cloud platforms, assessing performance, cost, scalability, and runtime deviations. We make our benchmark suite open-source, enabling rigorous and comparable evaluations of serverless workflows over time. Implementation: https://github.com/spcl/serverless-benchmarks Artifact: https://github.com/spcl/sebs-flow-artifact
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算已成为一种突出的范例，在云客户中具有显着的采用率。虽然该模型具有从部署和资源调度中进行抽象等优点，但由于各个功能的限制性质，它在处理复杂用例方面也存在局限性。无服务器工作流程通过将多个功能编排到一个内聚的应用程序中来解决此限制。然而，现有的无服务器工作流平台在编程模型和基础设施方面存在显着差异，这使得在实践中难以进行公平一致的性能评估。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了第一个无服务器工作流基准测试套件 SeBS-Flow，提供了一个与平台无关的工作流模型，可以跨不同平台进行一致的基准测试。 SeBS-Flow 包括六个实际应用程序基准和四个代表不同计算模式的微基准。我们对三大云平台进行综合评估，评估性能、成本、可扩展性和运行时偏差。我们将基准套件开源，以便随着时间的推移对无服务器工作流程进行严格且可比较的评估。实现：https://github.com/spcl/serverless-benchmarks 工件：https://github.com/spcl/sebs-flow-artifact

papers.title: Serverless Cold Starts and Where to Find Them.
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes a month-long trace of 85 billion user requests and 11.9 million cold starts from Huawei's serverless cloud platform. Our analysis spans workloads from five data centers. We focus on cold starts and provide a comprehensive examination of the underlying factors influencing the number and duration of cold starts. These factors include trigger types, request synchronicity, runtime languages, and function resource allocations. We investigate components of cold starts, including pod allocation time, code and dependency deployment time, and scheduling delays, and examine their relationships with runtime languages, trigger types, and resource allocation. We introduce pod utility ratio to measure the pod's useful lifetime relative to its cold start time, giving a more complete picture of cold starts, and see that some pods with long cold start times have longer useful lifetimes. Our findings reveal the complexity and multifaceted origins of the number, duration, and characteristics of cold starts, driven by differences in trigger types, runtime languages, and function resource allocations. For example, cold starts in Region 1 take up to 7 seconds, dominated by dependency deployment time and scheduling. In Region 2, cold starts take up to 3 seconds and are dominated by pod allocation time. Based on this, we identify opportunities to reduce the number and duration of cold starts using strategies for multi-region scheduling. Finally, we suggest directions for future research to address these challenges and enhance the performance of serverless cloud platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文分析了华为无服务器云平台长达一个月的850亿次用户请求和1190万次冷启动的跟踪。我们的分析涵盖五个数据中心的工作负载。我们专注于冷启动，并对影响冷启动次数和持续时间的潜在因素进行全面检查。这些因素包括触发器类型、请求同步性、运行时语言和函数资源分配。我们研究了冷启动的组成部分，包括 Pod 分配时间、代码和依赖项部署时间以及调度延迟，并检查它们与运行时语言、触发器类型和资源分配的关系。我们引入 Pod 利用率来衡量 Pod 相对于其冷启动时间的使用寿命，从而更全面地了解冷启动情况，并发现一些冷启动时间较长的 Pod 具有更长的使用寿命。我们的研究结果揭示了冷启动的数量、持续时间和特征的复杂性和多方面起源，这是由触发器类型、运行时语言和函数资源分配的差异驱动的。例如，区域 1 中的冷启动最多需要 7 秒，主要取决于依赖项部署时间和调度。在区域 2 中，冷启动最多需要 3 秒，并且主要由 Pod 分配时间决定。基于此，我们找到了使用多区域调度策略来减少冷启动次数和持续时间的机会。最后，我们提出了未来研究的方向，以应对这些挑战并提高无服务器云平台的性能。

papers.title: SkyServe: Serving AI Models across Regions and Clouds with Spot Instances.
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed an explosive growth of AI models. The high cost of hosting AI services on GPUs and their demanding service requirements, make it timely and challenging to lower service costs and guarantee service quality. While spot instances have long been offered with a large discount, spot preemptions have discouraged users from using them to host model replicas when serving AI models.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能模型呈爆炸式增长。由于人工智能服务托管在GPU上的成本较高，且服务要求较高，降低服务成本和保证服务质量面临着及时性和挑战性。虽然现货实例长期以来一直以很大的折扣提供，但现货抢占阻止了用户在服务人工智能模型时使用它们来托管模型副本。

papers.title: Solid State Drive Targeted Memory-Efficient Indexing for Universal I/O Patterns and Fragmentation Degrees.
papers.abstract: Thanks to the advance of device scaling technologies, the capacity of SSDs is rapidly increasing. Such increase, however, comes at the cost of a huge index table requiring large DRAM. To provide reasonable performance with less DRAM, various index structures exploiting locality and regularity of I/O references have been proposed. However, they provide deteriorated performance depending on I/O patterns and storage fragmentation. This paper proposes a novel approximate index structure, called AppL, which combines memory-efficient approximate indices and an LSM-tree that has an append-only and sorted nature. AppL reduces the index size to 6-8-bits per entry, which is considerably smaller than the typical index structures requiring 32-64-bits, and maintains such high memory efficiency irrespective of locality and fragmentation. By alleviating memory pressure, AppL achieves 33.6-72.4% shorter read latency and 28.4%-83.4% higher I/O throughput than state-of-the-art techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于设备扩展技术的进步，SSD的容量正在迅速增加。然而，这种增加是以需要大量 DRAM 的巨大索引表为代价的。为了用更少的 DRAM 提供合理的性能，已经提出了利用 I/O 引用的局部性和规律性的各种索引结构。然而，它们的性能会因 I/O 模式和存储碎片而降低。本文提出了一种新颖的近似索引结构，称为 AppL，它结合了内存高效的近似索引和具有仅追加和排序性质的 LSM 树。 AppL 将索引大小减少到每个条目 6-8 位，这比需要 32-64 位的典型索引结构要小得多，并且无论局部性和碎片如何，都可以保持如此高的内存效率。通过减轻内存压力，AppL 与最先进的技术相比，读取延迟缩短了 33.6-72.4%，I/O 吞吐量提高了 28.4%-83.4%。

papers.title: SpaceFusion: Advanced Deep Learning Operator Fusion via Space-Mapping Graph.
papers.abstract: This work proposes SpaceFusion, an advanced scheduler for efficient deep learning operator fusion. First, we develop a novel abstraction, the Space-Mapping Graph (SMG), to holistically model the spatial information of both inter- and intra-operator dependencies. Subsequently, we introduce the spatial and temporal slicers to decompose the fused spaces defined in SMGs, generating fusion schedules by analyzing and transforming dependencies. Finally, we present auto-scheduling methods that use the slicers to automatically create high-performance fusion schedules tailored to specific hardware resource configurations. End-to-end performance evaluations reveal that SpaceFusion achieves up to 8.79x speedup (3.54x on average) over baseline implementations from Huggingface for Transformer models, and a maximum of 2.21x speedup compared to the state-of-the-art manually-tuned implementations powered by FlashAttention.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 SpaceFusion，一种用于高效深度学习算子融合的高级调度程序。首先，我们开发了一种新颖的抽象，即空间映射图（SMG），以对运算符间和运算符内依赖性的空间信息进行整体建模。随后，我们引入空间和时间切片器来分解 SMG 中定义的融合空间，通过分析和转换依赖关系生成融合调度。最后，我们提出了自动调度方法，使用切片器自动创建适合特定硬件资源配置的高性能融合调度。端到端性能评估表明，与 Huggingface 的 Transformer 模型基准实现相比，SpaceFusion 实现了高达 8.79 倍的加速（平均 3.54 倍），与由 FlashAttention 支持的最先进的手动调整实现相比，最多实现了 2.21 倍的加速。

papers.title: SpInfer: Leveraging Low-Level Sparsity for Efficient Large Language Model Inference on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but their immense scale poses significant challenges in terms of both memory and computational costs. While unstructured pruning offers promising solutions by introducing sparsity to reduce resource requirements, realizing its benefits in LLM inference remains elusive. This is primarily due to the storage overhead of indexing non-zero elements and the inefficiency of sparse matrix multiplication (SpMM) kernels at low sparsity levels (around 50%). In this paper, we present SpInfer, a high-performance framework tailored for sparsified LLM inference on GPUs. SpInfer introduces Tensor-Core-Aware Bitmap Encoding (TCA-BME), a novel sparse format that minimizes indexing overhead by leveraging efficient bitmap-based indexing, optimized for GPU Tensor Core architectures. Furthermore, SpInfer integrates an optimized SpMM kernel with Shared Memory Bitmap Decoding (SMBD) and asynchronous pipeline design to enhance computational efficiency. Experimental results show that SpInfer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SpMM implementations (up to 2.14× and 2.27× over Flash-LLM and SparTA, respectively) across a range of sparsity levels (30% to 70%), with substantial improvements in both memory efficiency and end-to-end inference speed (up to 1.58×). SpInfer outperforms highly optimized cuBLAS at sparsity levels as low as 30%, marking the first effective translation of unstructured pruning's theoretical advantages into practical performance gains for LLM inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已展现出非凡的功能，但其巨大的规模在内存和计算成本方面提出了重大挑战。虽然非结构化剪枝通过引入稀疏性来减少资源需求，提供了有前途的解决方案，但实现其在 LLM 推理中的好处仍然难以实现。这主要是由于索引非零元素的存储开销以及稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 内核在低稀疏级别（大约 50%）下的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 SpInfer，这是一个专为 GPU 上的稀疏 LLM 推理而定制的高性能框架。 SpInfer 推出了 Tensor-Core-Aware 位图编码 (TCA-BME)，这是一种新颖的稀疏格式，它通过利用高效的基于位图的索引来最大限度地减少索引开销，并针对 GPU Tensor Core 架构进行了优化。此外，SpInfer将优化的SpMM内核与共享内存位图解码（SMBD）和异步管道设计集成在一起，以提高计算效率。实验结果表明，SpInfer 在一系列稀疏级别（30% 到 70%）上显着优于最先进的 SpMM 实现（分别比 Flash-LLM 和 SparTA 提高了 2.14 倍和 2.27 倍），并且内存效率和端到端推理速度都得到了显着改进（高达 1.58 倍）。 SpInfer 在稀疏度水平低至 30% 时优于高度优化的 cuBLAS，这标志着非结构化剪枝的理论优势首次有效转化为 LLM 推理的实际性能增益。

papers.title: Stateful Large Language Model Serving with Pensieve.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are wildly popular today and it is important to serve them efficiently. Existing LLM serving systems are stateless across requests. Consequently, when LLMs are used in the common setting of multi-turn conversations, a growing log of the conversation history must be processed alongside any request by the serving system at each turn, resulting in repeated processing.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 如今非常流行，有效地为它们提供服务非常重要。现有的 LLM 服务系统在请求之间是无状态的。因此，当 LLM 用于多轮对话的常见设置时，每次服务系统必须处理不断增长的对话历史记录以及任何请求，从而导致重复处理。

papers.title: SuperFE: A Scalable and Flexible Feature Extractor for ML-based Traffic Analysis Applications.
papers.abstract: The feature extractor component in today's ML-based traffic analysis applications is becoming a key bottleneck. While mainstream software-based approaches can support flexible feature extraction, they fail to scale to multi-100Gbps network speed easily. Meanwhile, hardware-accelerated solutions can scale to high throughput, but cannot flexibly support generic traffic analysis applications. In this paper, we propose SuperFE, a feature extraction framework that allows users to extract traffic features efficiently and flexibly. SuperFE leverages the capabilities of both new-generation programmable switches and SmartNICs, with three key designs. First, SuperFE presents a user-friendly and extensible interface to support customized feature extraction policies, shielding underlying hardware implementation details and complexities. Second, SuperFE introduces a high-performance multi-granularity key-vector cache system in the programmable switches to batch necessary feature metadata for massive amounts of packets. Third, SuperFE exploits the multi-core parallel and hierarchical memory of SoC-based SmartNICs to achieve efficient feature computation with diverse streaming algorithms. Evaluations using our prototype demonstrate that SuperFE enables various state-of-the-art traffic analysis applications to efficiently extract features from multi-100Gbps raw traffic without compromising detection accuracy, and achieves nearly two orders of magnitude higher throughput than the software-based counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今基于机器学习的流量分析应用程序中的特征提取器组件正在成为一个关键瓶颈。虽然主流的基于软件的方法可以支持灵活的特征提取，但它们无法轻松扩展到 100Gbps 的网络速度。同时，硬件加速解决方案可以扩展到高吞吐量，但无法灵活支持通用流量分析应用。在本文中，我们提出了SuperFE，一种特征提取框架，允许用户高效、灵活地提取流量特征。 SuperFE 利用了新一代可编程交换机和 SmartNIC 的功能，具有三种关键设计。首先，SuperFE 提供了一个用户友好且可扩展的界面，以支持定制的特征提取策略，屏蔽底层硬件实现细节和复杂性。其次，SuperFE 在可编程交换机中引入了高性能多粒度键向量缓存系统，以批量处理大量数据包所需的功能元数据。第三，SuperFE 利用基于 SoC 的 SmartNIC 的多核并行和分层内存，通过多种流算法实现高效的特征计算。使用我们的原型进行的评估表明，SuperFE 使各种最先进的流量分析应用程序能够有效地从多 100Gbps 原始流量中提取特征，而不影响检测精度，并且与基于软件的同类产品相比，吞吐量提高了近两个数量级。

papers.title: T-MAC: CPU Renaissance via Table Lookup for Low-Bit LLM Deployment on Edge.
papers.abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices is increasingly important to enhance on-device intelligence. Weight quantization is crucial for reducing the memory footprint of LLMs on devices. However, low-bit LLMs necessitate mixed precision matrix multiplication (mpGEMM) of low precision weights and high precision activations during inference. Existing systems, lacking native support for mpGEMM, resort to dequantize weights for high precision computation. Such an indirect way can lead to a significant inference overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 对于增强设备上的智能变得越来越重要。权重量化对于减少 LLM 在设备上的内存占用至关重要。然而，低位 LLM 需要在推理过程中进行低精度权重和高精度激活的混合精度矩阵乘法 (mpGEMM)。现有系统缺乏对 mpGEMM 的原生支持，只能通过去量化权重来实现高精度计算。这种间接的方式可能会导致显着的推理开销。

papers.title: Themis: Finding Imbalance Failures in Distributed File Systems via a Load Variance Model.
papers.abstract: A distributed file system (DFS) is a file system that spans across multiple file servers or multiple locations. The load balancing mechanism in a DFS is crucial, as it optimizes resource utilization across all nodes and improves response times. However, incorrect load scheduling or implementation errors in load balancing algorithms can lead to system imbalance, hang-ups, and even crashes. Such imbalance failures may be critical and pose a significant threat to the availability and security of distributed file systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式文件系统 (DFS) 是跨多个文件服务器或多个位置的文件系统。 DFS 中的负载平衡机制至关重要，因为它优化了所有节点的资源利用率并缩短了响应时间。然而，不正确的负载调度或负载均衡算法的实现错误可能会导致系统不平衡、挂起，甚至崩溃。这种不平衡故障可能很严重，并对分布式文件系统的可用性和安全性构成重大威胁。

papers.title: Towards Efficient Flash Caches with Emerging NVMe Flexible Data Placement SSDs.
papers.abstract: NVMe Flash-based SSDs are widely deployed in data centers to cache working sets of large-scale web services. As data centers face increasing sustainability demands, such as reduced carbon emissions, efficient management of Flash overprovisioning and endurance has become crucial. Our analysis demonstrates that mixing data with different lifetimes on Flash blocks results in high device garbage collection costs, which either reduce device lifetime or necessitate host overprovisioning. Targeted data placement on Flash to minimize data intermixing and thus device write amplification shows promise for addressing this issue.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 NVMe 闪存的 SSD 广泛部署在数据中心中，用于缓存大规模 Web 服务的工作集。随着数据中心面临日益增长的可持续性需求（例如减少碳排放），对闪存过度配置和耐用性的有效管理变得至关重要。我们的分析表明，在闪存块上混合具有不同生命周期的数据会导致较高的设备垃圾收集成本，这要么会缩短设备生命周期，要么需要主机过度配置。在闪存上进行有针对性的数据放置，以最大限度地减少数据混合，从而减少器件写入放大，有望解决这一问题。

papers.title: Towards VM Rescheduling Optimization Through Deep Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Modern industry-scale data centers need to manage a large number of virtual machines (VMs). Due to the continual creation and release of VMs, many small resource fragments are scattered across physical machines (PMs). To handle these fragments, data centers periodically reschedule some VMs to alternative PMs, a practice commonly referred to as VM rescheduling. Despite the increasing importance of VM rescheduling as data centers grow in size, the problem remains understudied. We first show that, unlike most combinatorial optimization tasks, the inference time of VM rescheduling algorithms significantly influences their performance, due to dynamic VM state changes during this period. This causes existing methods to scale poorly. Therefore, we develop a reinforcement learning system for VM rescheduling, VMR2L, which incorporates a set of customized techniques, such as a two-stage framework that accommodates diverse constraints and workload conditions, a feature extraction module that captures relational information specific to rescheduling, as well as a risk-seeking evaluation enabling users to optimize the trade-off between latency and accuracy. We conduct extensive experiments with data from an industry-scale data center. Our results show that VMR2L can achieve a performance comparable to the optimal solution but with a running time of seconds. Code12 and datasets3 are open-sourced.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代行业规模的数据中心需要管理大量虚拟机 (VM)。由于VM的不断创建和释放，许多小的资源碎片分散在物理机（PM）上。为了处理这些碎片，数据中心定期将一些虚拟机重新调度到替代的 PM，这种做法通常称为虚拟机重新调度。尽管随着数据中心规模的扩大，虚拟机重新调度变得越来越重要，但这个问题仍然没有得到充分研究。我们首先表明，与大多数组合优化任务不同，VM 重新调度算法的推理时间会显着影响其性能，因为在此期间 VM 状态会发生动态变化。这导致现有方法扩展性较差。因此，我们开发了一个用于VM重新调度的强化学习系统VMR2L，它结合了一组定制技术，例如适应不同约束和工作负载条件的两阶段框架、捕获特定于重新调度的关系信息的特征提取模块，以及使用户能够优化延迟和准确性之间的权衡的风险寻求评估。我们利用来自行业规模数据中心的数据进行了广泛的实验。我们的结果表明，VMR2L 可以实现与最优解决方案相当的性能，但运行时间为秒。 Code12 和 datasets3 是开源的。

papers.title: TUNA: Tuning Unstable and Noisy Cloud Applications.
papers.abstract: Autotuning plays a pivotal role in optimizing the performance of systems, particularly in large-scale cloud deployments. One of the main challenges in performing autotuning in the cloud arises from performance variability. We first investigate the extent to which noise slows autotuning and find that as little as 5% noise can lead to a 2.5x slowdown in converging to the best-performing configuration. We measure the magnitude of noise in cloud computing settings and find that while some components (CPU, disk) have almost no performance variability, there are still sources of significant variability (caches, memory). Furthermore, variability leads to autotuning finding unstable configurations. As many as 63.3% of the configurations selected as "best" during tuning can have their performance degrade by 30% or more when deployed. Using this as motivation, we propose a novel approach to improve the efficiency of autotuning systems by (a) detecting and removing outlier configurations and (b) using ML-based approaches to provide a more stable true signal of de-noised experiment results to the optimizer. The resulting system, TUNA (Tuning Unstable and Noisy Cloud Applications) enables faster convergence and robust configurations. Tuning PostgreSQL running mssales, an enterprise production workload, we find that TUNA can lead to 1.88x lower running time on average with 2.58x lower standard deviation compared to traditional sampling methodologies.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动调优在优化系统性能方面发挥着关键作用，特别是在大规模云部署中。在云中执行自动调整的主要挑战之一来自性能变化。我们首先研究了噪声在多大程度上减慢了自动调节速度，发现低至 5% 的噪声就可能导致收敛到最佳性能配置时速度减慢 2.5 倍。我们测量了云计算设置中的噪声大小，发现虽然某些组件（CPU、磁盘）几乎没有性能变化，但仍然存在显着变化的来源（缓存、内存）。此外，可变性会导致自动调整发现不稳定的配置。在调优过程中被选为“最佳”的配置中，多达 63.3% 的配置在部署时性能会下降 30% 或更多。以此为动机，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来提高自动调节系统的效率，方法是（a）检测和删除异常配置，以及（b）使用基于机器学习的方法向优化器提供更稳定的去噪实验结果的真实信号。由此产生的系统 TUNA（调整不稳定和嘈杂的云应用程序）可实现更快的收敛和稳健的配置。通过对运行 mssales（一种企业生产工作负载）的 PostgreSQL 进行调优，我们发现与传统采样方法相比，TUNA 可以将运行时间平均缩短 1.88 倍，标准差降低 2.58 倍。

papers.title: Understanding and Detecting SQL Function Bugs: Using Simple Boundary Arguments to Trigger Hundreds of DBMS Bugs.
papers.abstract: Built-in SQL functions are crucial in Database Management Systems (DBMSs), supporting various operations and computations across multiple data types. They are essential for querying, data transformation, and aggregation. Despite their importance, the bugs in SQL functions have caused widespread problems in the real world, from system failures to arbitrary code execution. However, the understanding of the bug characteristics is limited. More importantly, conventional function testing methods struggle to generate semantically correct SQL test cases, while DBMS testing efforts are hard to measure built-in SQL functions.
papers.abstract_zh: 内置 SQL 函数在数据库管理系统 (DBMS) 中至关重要，支持跨多种数据类型的各种操作和计算。它们对于查询、数据转换和聚合至关重要。尽管它们很重要，但 SQL 函数中的错误在现实世界中引起了广泛的问题，从系统故障到任意代码执行。然而，对 bug 特征的了解是有限的。更重要的是，传统的函数测试方法很难生成语义上正确的 SQL 测试用例，而 DBMS 测试工作很难衡量内置的 SQL 函数。

papers.title: Understanding the Linux Kernel, Visually.
papers.abstract: Understanding the Linux kernel is challenging due to its large and complex program state. While existing kernel debugging tools provide full access to kernel states at arbitrary levels of detail, developers often spend a significant amount of time sifting through redundant information to find what is truly useful. Additionally, the textual results provided by traditional debuggers are often insufficient for expressing high-dimensional information in a readable manner.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 Linux 内核的程序状态庞大且复杂，理解它是一项挑战。虽然现有的内核调试工具提供对任意详细级别的内核状态的完全访问，但开发人员经常花费大量时间筛选冗余信息以找到真正有用的信息。此外，传统调试器提供的文本结果通常不足以以可读的方式表达高维信息。

papers.title: Accelerating Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning With GeniBatch.
papers.abstract: Cross-silo privacy-preserving machine learning (PPML) adopt; Partial Homomorphic Encryption (PHE) for secure data combination and high-quality model training across multiple organizations (e.g., medical and financial). However, PHE introduces significant computation and communication overheads due to data inflation. Batch optimization is an encouraging direction to mitigate the problem by compressing multiple data into a single ciphertext. While promising, it is impractical for a large number of cross-silo PPML applications due to the limited vector operations support and severe data corruption.
papers.abstract_zh: 采用跨孤岛隐私保护机器学习（PPML）；部分同态加密 (PHE)，用于跨多个组织（例如医疗和金融）的安全数据组合和高质量模型训练。然而，由于数据膨胀，PHE 引入了大量的计算和通信开销。批量优化是通过将多个数据压缩为单个密文来缓解该问题的一个令人鼓舞的方向。虽然很有希望，但由于有限的向量操作支持和严重的数据损坏，对于大量跨孤岛 PPML 应用程序来说是不切实际的。

papers.title: Aceso: Efficient Parallel DNN Training through Iterative Bottleneck Alleviation.
papers.abstract: Many parallel mechanisms, including data parallelism, tensor parallelism, and pipeline parallelism, have been proposed and combined together to support training increasingly large deep neural networks (DNN) on massive GPU devices. Given a DNN model and GPU cluster, finding the optimal configuration by combining these parallelism mechanisms is an NP-hard problem. Widely adopted mathematical programming approaches have been proposed to search in a configuration subspace, but they are still too costly when scaling to large models over numerous devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多并行机制，包括数据并行、张量并行和管道并行，已经被提出并组合在一起，以支持在大规模 GPU 设备上训练越来越大的深度神经网络 (DNN)。给定 DNN 模型和 GPU 集群，通过组合这些并行机制找到最佳配置是一个 NP 困难问题。已经提出了广泛采用的数学编程方法来在配置子空间中进行搜索，但在扩展到众多设备上的大型模型时，它们的成本仍然太高。

papers.title: Adaptable Runtime Monitoring for Intermittent Systems.
papers.abstract: Batteryless energy harvesting devices compute intermittently due to power failures that frequently interrupt the computational activity and lead to charging delays. To ensure functional correctness in intermittent computing, applications must exhibit several unique properties, such as guarantees for computational progress despite power failures and prevention of stale operations caused by charging delays. We observe that current software support for intermittent computing allows for checking only a fixed set of properties and leads to tightly coupled application and property-checking, thus hampering modularity, scalability, and maintainability.
papers.abstract_zh: 无电池能量收集设备由于电源故障而间歇性计算，经常中断计算活动并导致充电延迟。为了确保间歇计算中的功能正确性，应用程序必须表现出几个独特的属性，例如在电源故障的情况下保证计算进度以及防止充电延迟导致的陈旧操作。我们观察到，当前对间歇性计算的软件支持仅允许检查一组固定的属性，并导致应用程序和属性检查紧密耦合，从而阻碍了模块化、可扩展性和可维护性。

papers.title: Astraea: Towards Fair and Efficient Learning-based Congestion Control.
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed a plethora of learning-based solutions for congestion control (CC) that demonstrate better performance over traditional TCP schemes. However, they fail to provide consistently good convergence properties, including fairness, fast convergence and stability, due to the mismatch between their objective functions and these properties. Despite being intuitive, integrating these properties into existing learning-based CC is challenging, because: 1) their training environments are designed for the performance optimization of single flow but incapable of cooperative multi-flow optimization, and 2) there is no directly measurable metric to represent these properties into the training objective function.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来出现了大量基于学习的拥塞控制 (CC) 解决方案，这些解决方案比传统 TCP 方案表现出更好的性能。然而，由于目标函数与这些特性之间的不匹配，它们无法提供一致的良好收敛特性，包括公平性、快速收敛和稳定性。尽管很直观，但将这些属性集成到现有的基于学习的 CC 中是具有挑战性的，因为：1）它们的训练环境是为单流的性能优化而设计的，但无法进行协作多流优化；2）没有直接可测量的度量来将这些属性表示到训练目标函数中。

papers.title: Atlas: Hybrid Cloud Migration Advisor for Interactive Microservices.
papers.abstract: Hybrid cloud provides an attractive solution to microservices for better resource elasticity. A subset of application components can be offloaded from the on-premises cluster to the cloud, where they can readily access additional resources. However, the selection of this subset is challenging because of the large number of possible combinations. A poor choice degrades the application performance, disrupts the critical services, and increases the cost to the extent of making the use of hybrid cloud unviable. This paper presents Atlas, a hybrid cloud migration advisor. Atlas uses a data-driven approach to learn how each user-facing API utilizes different components and their network footprints to drive the migration decision. It learns to accelerate the discovery of high-quality migration plans from millions and offers recommendations with customizable trade-offs among three quality indicators: end-to-end latency of user-facing APIs representing application performance, service availability, and cloud hosting costs. Atlas continuously monitors the application even after the migration for proactive recommendations. Our evaluation shows that Atlas can achieve 21% better API performance (latency) and 11% cheaper cost with less service disruption than widely used solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合云为微服务提供了一个有吸引力的解决方案，以实现更好的资源弹性。可以将应用程序组件的子集从本地集群卸载到云，以便它们可以轻松访问其他资源。然而，由于可能的组合数量众多，因此该子集的选择具有挑战性。糟糕的选择会降低应用程序性能，破坏关键服务，并增加成本，甚至使混合云的使用变得不可行。本文介绍了 Atlas，一种混合​​云迁移顾问。 Atlas 使用数据驱动的方法来了解每个面向用户的 API 如何利用不同的组件及其网络足迹来推动迁移决策。它学习如何加速发现数百万人的高质量迁移计划，并提供在三个质量指标之间进行可定制权衡的建议：代表应用程序性能、服务可用性和云托管成本的面向用户的 API 的端到端延迟。即使在迁移后，Atlas 也会持续监控应用程序以获取主动建议。我们的评估表明，与广泛使用的解决方案相比，Atlas 的 API 性能（延迟）提高了 21%，成本降低了 11%，服务中断也更少。

papers.title: Automatic Root Cause Analysis via Large Language Models for Cloud Incidents.
papers.abstract: Ensuring the reliability and availability of cloud services necessitates efficient root cause analysis (RCA) for cloud incidents. Traditional RCA methods, which rely on manual investigations of data sources such as logs and traces, are often laborious, error-prone, and challenging for on-call engineers. In this paper, we introduce RCACopilot, an innovative on-call system empowered by the large language model for automating RCA of cloud incidents. RCACopilot matches incoming incidents to corresponding incident handlers based on their alert types, aggregates the critical runtime diagnostic information, predicts the incident's root cause category, and provides an explanatory narrative. We evaluate RCACopilot using a real-world dataset consisting of a year's worth of incidents from Microsoft. Our evaluation demonstrates that RCACopilot achieves RCA accuracy up to 0.766. Furthermore, the diagnostic information collection component of RCACopilot has been successfully in use at Microsoft for over four years.
papers.abstract_zh: 确保云服务的可靠性和可用性需要对云事件进行有效的根本原因分析 (RCA)。传统的 RCA 方法依赖于对日志和跟踪等数据源进行手动调查，对于待命工程师来说通常很费力、容易出错且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 RCACopilot，这是一种创新的待命系统，由大型语言模型支持，用于自动化云事件 RCA。 RCACopilot 根据警报类型将传入事件与相应的事件处理程序进行匹配，聚合关键运行时诊断信息，预测事件的根本原因类别，并提供解释性叙述。我们使用由 Microsoft 一年的事件组成的真实数据集来评估 RCACopilot。我们的评估表明 RCACopilot 的 RCA 准确度高达 0.766。此外，RCACopilot 的诊断信息收集组件已在 Microsoft 成功使用了四年多。

papers.title: Bandle: Asynchronous State Machine Replication Made Efficient.
papers.abstract: State machine replication (SMR) uses consensus as its core component for reaching agreement among a group of processes, in order to provide fault-tolerant services. Most SMR protocols, such as Paxos and Raft, are designed in the partial synchrony model. Partially synchronous protocols rely on timing assumptions to elect a special role (such as the leader), which may become the performance bottleneck under a heavy workload. From an engineering perspective, partially synchronous protocols have to wait for a pre-defined period of time and implement a (complicated) failover mechanism in order to replace the faulty leader. In contrast, asynchronous protocols are immune to such problems.
papers.abstract_zh: 状态机复制（SMR）使用共识作为其核心组件，用于在一组进程之间达成一致，以提供容错服务。大多数SMR协议，例如Paxos和Raft，都是在部分同步模型中设计的。部分同步协议依赖于时序假设来选举特殊角色（例如领导者），这可能会成为繁重工作负载下的性能瓶颈。从工程角度来看，部分同步协议必须等待预定义的时间段并实现（复杂的）故障转移机制才能替换出现故障的领导者。相比之下，异步协议则不受此类问题的影响。

papers.title: Blaze: Holistic Caching for Iterative Data Processing.
papers.abstract: Modern data processing workloads, such as machine learning and graph processing, involve iterative computations to converge generated models into higher accuracy. An effective caching mechanism is vital to expedite iterative computations since the intermediate data that needs to be stored in memory grows larger over iterations, often exceeding the memory capacity. However, existing systems handle intermediate data through separate operational layers (e.g., caching, eviction, and recovery), with each layer working independently in a greedy or cost-agnostic manner. These layers typically rely on user annotations and past access patterns, failing to make globally optimal decisions for the workload.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代数据处理工作负载（例如机器学习和图形处理）涉及迭代计算，以将生成的模型收敛到更高的精度。有效的缓存机制对于加快迭代计算至关重要，因为需要存储在内存中的中间数据在迭代过程中会变得越来越大，通常会超出内存容量。然而，现有系统通过单独的操作层（例如缓存、驱逐和恢复）处理中间数据，每个层以贪婪或成本不可知的方式独立工作。这些层通常依赖于用户注释和过去的访问模式，无法针对工作负载做出全局最佳决策。

papers.title: Blox: A Modular Toolkit for Deep Learning Schedulers.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning (DL) workloads have rapidly increased in popularity in enterprise clusters and several new cluster schedulers have been proposed in recent years to support these workloads. With rapidly evolving DL workloads, it is challenging to quickly prototype and compare scheduling policies across workloads. Further, as prior systems target different aspects of scheduling (resource allocation, placement, elasticity etc.), it is also challenging to combine these techniques and understand the overall benefits. To address these challenges we propose Blox, a modular toolkit which allows developers to compose individual components and realize diverse scheduling frameworks. We identify a set of core abstractions for DL scheduling, implement several existing schedulers using these abstractions, and verify the fidelity of these implementations by reproducing results from prior research. We also highlight how we can evaluate and compare existing schedulers in new settings: different workload traces, higher cluster load, change in DNN workloads and deployment characteristics. Finally, we showcase Blox's extensibility by composing policies from different schedulers, and implementing novel policies with minimal code changes. Blox is available at https://github.com/msr-fiddle/blox.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 工作负载在企业集群中迅速普及，近年来提出了几种新的集群调度程序来支持这些工作负载。随着深度学习工作负载的快速发展，快速构建原型并比较跨工作负载的调度策略具有挑战性。此外，由于现有系统针对调度的不同方面（资源分配、放置、弹性等），因此将这些技术结合起来并了解总体优势也具有挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Blox，这是一个模块化工具包，允许开发人员组合单独的组件并实现不同的调度框架。我们确定了深度学习调度的一组核心抽象，使用这些抽象实现了几个现有的调度器，并通过重现先前研究的结果来验证这些实现的保真度。我们还重点介绍了如何在新设置中评估和比较现有调度程序：不同的工作负载跟踪、更高的集群负载、DNN 工作负载和部署特征的变化。最后，我们通过组合来自不同调度程序的策略并以最少的代码更改实现新颖的策略来展示 Blox 的可扩展性。 Blox 可从 https://github.com/msr-fiddle/blox 获取。

papers.title: CCL-BTree: A Crash-Consistent Locality-Aware B+-Tree for Reducing XPBuffer-Induced Write Amplification in Persistent Memory.
papers.abstract: In persistent B+ -Tree, random updates of small key-value (KV) pairs will cause severe XPBuffer-induced write amplification (XBI-amplification) because CPU cacheline size is smaller than media access granularity in persistent memory (PM). We observe that XBI-amplification directly determines the application performance when the PM bandwidth is exhausted in multi-thread scenarios. However, none of the existing work can efficiently address the XBI-amplification issue while maintaining superior range query performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 在持久 B+ -Tree 中，小键值 (KV) 对的随机更新将导致严重的 XPBuffer 引起的写放大 (XBI-amplification)，因为 CPU 缓存行大小小于持久内存 (PM) 中的介质访问粒度。我们观察到，XBI 放大直接决定了多线程场景下 PM 带宽耗尽时的应用程序性能。然而，现有的工作都无法在保持卓越的范围查询性能的同时有效解决 XBI 放大问题。

papers.title: CDMPP: A Device-Model Agnostic Framework for Latency Prediction of Tensor Programs.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have shown excellent performance in a wide range of machine learning applications. Knowing the latency of running a DNN model or tensor program on a specific device is useful in various tasks, such as DNN graph- or tensor-level optimization and device selection. Considering the large space of DNN models and devices that impedes direct profiling of all combinations, recent efforts focus on building a predictor to model the performance of DNN models on different devices. However, none of the existing attempts have achieved a cost model that can accurately predict the performance of various tensor programs while supporting both training and inference accelerators. We propose CDMPP, an efficient tensor program latency prediction framework for both cross-model and cross-device prediction. We design an informative but efficient representation of tensor programs, called compact ASTs, and a pre-order-based positional encoding method, to capture the internal structure of tensor programs. We develop a domain-adaption-inspired method to learn domain-invariant representations and devise a KMeans-based sampling algorithm, for the predictor to learn from different domains (i.e., different DNN operators and devices). Our extensive experiments on a diverse range of DNN models and devices demonstrate that CDMPP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with 14.03% and 10.85% prediction error for cross-model and cross-device prediction, respectively, and one order of magnitude higher training efficiency. The implementation and the expanded dataset are available at https://github.com/joapolarbear/cdmpp.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在广泛的机器学习应用中表现出了出色的性能。了解在特定设备上运行 DNN 模型或张量程序的延迟对于各种任务非常有用，例如 DNN 图级或张量级优化和设备选择。考虑到 DNN 模型和设备的庞大空间阻碍了对所有组合的直接分析，最近的工作重点是构建一个预测器来对 DNN 模型在不同设备上的性能进行建模。然而，现有的尝试都没有实现能够准确预测各种张量程序的性能，同时支持训练和推理加速器的成本模型。我们提出了 CDMPP，一种用于跨模型和跨设备预测的高效张量程序延迟预测框架。我们设计了一种信息丰富但高效的张量程序表示（称为紧凑 AST），以及基于预序的位置编码方法，以捕获张量程序的内部结构。我们开发了一种受域适应启发的方法来学习域不变表示，并设计了一种基于 KMeans 的采样算法，以便预测器从不同的域（即不同的 DNN 运算符和设备）中学习。我们对各种 DNN 模型和设备进行的广泛实验表明，CDMPP 显着优于最先进的基线，跨模型和跨设备预测的预测误差分别为 14.03% 和 10.85%，训练效率提高了一个数量级。实现和扩展数据集可在 https://github.com/joapolarbear/cdmpp 获取。

papers.title: Characterization and Reclamation of Frozen Garbage in Managed FaaS Workloads.
papers.abstract: FaaS (function-as-a-service) is becoming a popular workload in cloud environments due to its virtues such as auto-scaling and pay-as-you-go. High-level languages like JavaScript and Java are commonly used in FaaS for programmability, but their managed runtimes complicate memory management in the cloud. This paper first observes the issue of frozen garbage, which is caused by freezing cached function instances where their threads have been paused but the unused memory (e.g., garbage) is not reclaimed due to the semantic gap between FaaS and the managed runtime. This paper presents the first characterization of the negative effects induced by frozen garbage with various functions, which uncovers that it can occupy more than half of FaaS instances' memory resources on average. To this end, this paper proposes Desiccant, a freeze-aware memory manager for managed workloads in FaaS, which reclaims idle memory resources consumed by frozen garbage from managed runtime instances and thus notably improves memory efficiency. The evaluation on various FaaS workloads shows that Desiccant can reduce FaaS functions' peak memory consumption by up to 6.72×. Such saved memory consumption allows caching more FaaS instances to reduce the frequency of cold boots (creating instances before function execution) and p99 latency by up to 4.49× and 37.5%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: FaaS（功能即服务）由于其自动扩展和按需付费等优点，正在成为云环境中流行的工作负载。 JavaScript 和 Java 等高级语言通常在 FaaS 中用于实现可编程性，但它们的托管运行时使云中的内存管理变得复杂。本文首先观察了冻结垃圾的问题，这是由于冻结了缓存的函数实例而导致的，其中它们的线程已暂停，但由于 FaaS 和托管运行时之间的语义差距，未使用的内存（例如垃圾）没有被回收。本文首次描述了具有各种功能的冻结垃圾带来的负面影响，发现它平均可以占用 FaaS 实例一半以上的内存资源。为此，本文提出了 Desiccant，一种用于 FaaS 中托管工作负载的冻结感知内存管理器，它从托管运行时实例中回收冻结垃圾消耗的空闲内存资源，从而显着提高内存效率。对各种 FaaS 工作负载的评估表明，Desiccant 可以将 FaaS 功能的峰值内存消耗降低高达 6.72 倍。这样节省的内存消耗允许缓存更多 FaaS 实例，从而将冷启动频率（在函数执行之前创建实例）和 p99 延迟分别降低高达 4.49 倍和 37.5%。

papers.title: Concealing Compression-accelerated I/O for HPC Applications through In Situ Task Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Lossy compression and asynchronous I/O are two of the most effective solutions for reducing storage overhead and enhancing I/O performance in large-scale high-performance computing (HPC) applications. However, current approaches have limitations that prevent them from fully leveraging lossy compression, and they may also result in task collisions, which restrict the overall performance of HPC applications. To address these issues, we propose an optimization approach for the task scheduling problem that encompasses computation, compression, and I/O. Our algorithm adaptively selects the optimal compression and I/O queue to minimize the performance degradation of the computation. We also introduce an intra-node I/O workload balancing mechanism that evenly distributes the workload across different processes. Additionally, we design a framework that incorporates fine-grained compression, a compressed data buffer, and a shared Huffman tree to fully benefit from our proposed task scheduling. Experimental results with up to 16 nodes and 64 GPUs from ORNL Summit, as well as real-world HPC applications, demonstrate that our solution reduces I/O overhead by up to 3.8× and 2.6× compared to non-compression and asynchronous I/O solutions, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 有损压缩和异步 I/O 是在大规模高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序中减少存储开销和增强 I/O 性能的两种最有效的解决方案。然而，当前的方法存在局限性，无法充分利用有损压缩，并且还可能导致任务冲突，从而限制 HPC 应用程序的整体性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种针对任务调度问题的优化方法，其中包括计算、压缩和 I/O。我们的算法自适应地选择最佳压缩和 I/O 队列，以最大限度地减少计算性能下降。我们还引入了节点内 I/O 工作负载平衡机制，可以在不同进程之间均匀分配工作负载。此外，我们设计了一个框架，其中包含细粒度压缩、压缩数据缓冲区和共享霍夫曼树，以充分受益于我们提出的任务调度。 ORNL Summit 的多达 16 个节点和 64 个 GPU 的实验结果以及实际的 HPC 应用程序表明，与非压缩和异步 I/O 解决方案相比，我们的解决方案分别将 I/O 开销减少了 3.8 倍和 2.6 倍。

papers.title: Contigra: Graph Mining with Containment Constraints.
papers.abstract: While graph mining systems employ efficient task-parallel strategies to quickly explore subgraphs of interest (or matches), they remain oblivious to containment constraints like maximality and minimality, resulting in expensive constraint checking on every explored match as well as redundant explorations that limit their scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然图挖掘系统采用高效的任务并行策略来快速探索感兴趣的子图（或匹配），但它们仍然忽视最大值和最小值等包含约束，从而导致对每个探索的匹配进行昂贵的约束检查以及限制其可扩展性的冗余探索。

papers.title: Core Graph: Exploiting Edge Centrality to Speedup the Evaluation of Iterative Graph Queries.
papers.abstract: When evaluating an iterative graph query over a large graph, systems incur significant overheads due to repeated graph transfer across the memory hierarchy coupled with repeated (redundant) propagation of values over the edges in the graph. An approach for reducing these overheads combines the use of a small proxy graph and the large original graph in a two phase query evaluation. The first phase evaluates the query on the proxy graph incurring low overheads and producing mostly precise results. The second phase uses these mostly precise results to bootstrap query evaluation on the larger original graph producing fully precise results. The effectiveness of this approach depends upon the quality of the proxy graph. Prior methods find proxy graphs that are either large or produce highly imprecise results.
papers.abstract_zh: 当评估大型图上的迭代图查询时，由于跨内存层次结构的重复图传输以及图边缘上值的重复（冗余）传播，系统会产生大量开销。减少这些开销的方法在两阶段查询评估中结合使用小型代理图和大型原始图。第一阶段评估代理图上的查询，产生较低的开销并产生大部分精确的结果。第二阶段使用这些最精确的结果来引导对较大原始图的查询评估，产生完全精确的结果。这种方法的有效性取决于代理图的质量。先前的方法发现代理图要么很大，要么产生非常不精确的结果。

papers.title: CSAL: the Next-Gen Local Disks for the Cloud.
papers.abstract: Cloud local disks are attractive for their affordable price and high performance. The recent advancement in CPUs motivates cloud vendors to further multiplex the computing resources to serve more users. Unfortunately, such proposals are constrained by the limited offerings of cloud local disks per server as the underlying storage devices are either large but slow (e.g., HDDs) or fast yet small (e.g., NVMe SSDs).
papers.abstract_zh: 云本地盘以其实惠的价格和高性能而具有吸引力。 CPU 的最新进步促使云供应商进一步复用计算资源以服务更多用户。不幸的是，此类提议受到每台服务器提供的云本地磁盘有限的限制，因为底层存储设备要么大但慢（例如 HDD），要么快但小（例如 NVMe SSD）。

papers.title: Dashing and Star: Byzantine Fault Tolerance with Weak Certificates.
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) protocols assuming partial synchrony such as SBFT and HotStuff use regular certificates obtained from 2f + 1 (partial) signatures. We show that one can use weak certificates obtained from only f + 1 signatures to assist in designing more robust and more efficient BFT protocols. We design and implement two BFT systems: Dashing (a family of two HotStuff-style BFT protocols) and Star (a parallel BFT framework).
papers.abstract_zh: 最先进的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 协议假设部分同步，例如 SBFT 和 HotStuff，使用从 2f + 1（部分）签名获得的常规证书。我们证明，可以使用仅从 f + 1 个签名获得的弱证书来帮助设计更稳健、更高效的 BFT 协议。我们设计并实现了两个 BFT 系统：Dashing（两个 HotStuff 风格的 BFT 协议系列）和 Star（一个并行 BFT 框架）。

papers.title: DeTA: Minimizing Data Leaks in Federated Learning via Decentralized and Trustworthy Aggregation.
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) relies on a central authority to oversee and aggregate model updates contributed by multiple participating parties in the training process. This centralization of sensitive model updates naturally raises concerns about the trustworthiness of the central aggregation server, as well as the potential risks associated with server failures or breaches, which could result in loss and leaks of model updates. Moreover, recent attacks have demonstrated that, by obtaining the leaked model updates, malicious actors can even reconstruct substantial amounts of private data belonging to training participants. This underscores the critical necessity to rethink the existing FL system architecture to mitigate emerging attacks in the evolving threat landscape. One straightforward approach is to fortify the central aggregator with confidential computing (CC), which offers hardware-assisted protection for runtime computation and can be remotely verified for execution integrity. However, a growing number of security vulnerabilities have surfaced in tandem with the adoption of CC, indicating that depending solely on this singular defense may not provide the requisite resilience to thwart data leaks.
papers.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 依靠中央机构来监督和汇总培训过程中多个参与方贡献的模型更新。这种敏感模型更新的集中化自然会引发人们对中央聚合服务器的可信度以及与服务器故障或违规相关的潜在风险的担忧，这可能会导致模型更新的丢失和泄漏。此外，最近的攻击表明，通过获取泄露的模型更新，恶意行为者甚至可以重建属于训练参与者的大量私人数据。这强调了重新思考现有 FL 系统架构的迫切必要性，以减轻不断变化的威胁环境中不断出现的攻击。一种简单的方法是通过机密计算（CC）来强化中央聚合器，它为运行时计算提供硬件辅助保护，并且可以远程验证执行完整性。然而，随着 CC 的采用，越来越多的安全漏洞浮出水面，这表明仅仅依靠这种单一的防御可能无法提供阻止数据泄漏所需的弹性。

papers.title: Dordis: Efficient Federated Learning with Dropout-Resilient Differential Privacy.
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is increasingly deployed among multiple clients to train a shared model over decentralized data. To address privacy concerns, FL systems need to safeguard the clients' data from disclosure during training and control data leakage through trained models when exposed to untrusted domains. Distributed differential privacy (DP) offers an appealing solution in this regard as it achieves a balanced tradeoff between privacy and utility without a trusted server. However, existing distributed DP mechanisms are impractical in the presence of client dropout, resulting in poor privacy guarantees or degraded training accuracy. In addition, these mechanisms suffer from severe efficiency issues.
papers.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 越来越多地部署在多个客户端之间，以在分散的数据上训练共享模型。为了解决隐私问题，FL 系统需要保护客户的数据在训练期间不被泄露，并在暴露于不受信任的域时通过经过训练的模型控制数据泄漏。分布式差分隐私（DP）在这方面提供了一个有吸引力的解决方案，因为它无需可信服务器即可实现隐私和实用性之间的平衡权衡。然而，现有的分布式DP机制在存在客户端丢失的情况下是不切实际的，导致隐私保证较差或训练精度下降。此外，这些机制还存在严重的效率问题。

papers.title: Draconis: Network-Accelerated Scheduling for Microsecond-Scale Workloads.
papers.abstract: We present Draconis, a novel scheduler for workloads in the range of tens to hundreds of microseconds. Draconis challenges the popular belief that programmable switches cannot house the complex data structures, such as queues, needed to support an in-network scheduler. Using programmable switches, Draconis achieves the low scheduling tail latency and high throughput needed to support these microsecond-scale workloads on large clusters. Furthermore, Draconis supports a wide range of complex scheduling policies, including locality-aware scheduling, priority-based scheduling, and resource-based scheduling.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Draconis，这是一种新颖的调度程序，适用于数十到数百微秒的工作负载。 Draconis 挑战了人们普遍认为可编程交换机无法容纳支持网络内调度程序所需的复杂数据结构（例如队列）的观点。使用可编程交换机，Draconis 实现了支持大型集群上这些微秒级工作负载所需的低调度尾延迟和高吞吐量。此外，Draconis 支持各种复杂的调度策略，包括位置感知调度、基于优先级的调度和基于资源的调度。

papers.title: DynaPipe: Optimizing Multi-task Training through Dynamic Pipelines.
papers.abstract: Multi-task model training has been adopted to enable a single deep neural network model (often a large language model) to handle multiple tasks (e.g., question answering and text summarization). Multi-task training commonly receives input sequences of highly different lengths due to the diverse contexts of different tasks. Padding (to the same sequence length) or packing (short examples into long sequences of the same length) is usually adopted to prepare input samples for model training, which is nonetheless not space or computation efficient. This paper proposes a dynamic micro-batching approach to tackle sequence length variation and enable efficient multi-task model training. We advocate pipelineparallel training of the large model with variable-length micro-batches, each of which potentially comprises a different number of samples. We optimize micro-batch construction using a dynamic programming-based approach, and handle micro-batch execution time variation through dynamic pipeline and communication scheduling, enabling highly efficient pipeline training. Extensive evaluation on the FLANv2 dataset demonstrates up to 4.39x higher training throughput when training T5, and 3.25x when training GPT, as compared with packing-based baselines. DynaPipe's source code is publicly available at https://github.com/awslabs/optimizing-multitask-training-through-dynamic-pipelines.
papers.abstract_zh: 采用多任务模型训练，使单个深度神经网络模型（通常是大型语言模型）能够处理多个任务（例如，问答和文本摘要）。由于不同任务的上下文不同，多任务训练通常会接收长度差异很大的输入序列。通常采用填充（到相同的序列长度）或打包（将短示例放入相同长度的长序列）来准备用于模型训练的输入样本，但这在空间或计算效率上不高。本文提出了一种动态微批处理方法来解决序列长度变化并实现高效的多任务模型训练。我们提倡使用可变长度微批次对大型模型进行管道并行训练，每个微批次可能包含不同数量的样本。我们使用基于动态编程的方法优化微批量构建，并通过动态管道和通信调度处理微批量执行时间变化，从而实现高效的管道训练。对 FLANv2 数据集的广泛评估表明，与基于打包的基线相比，训练 T5 时的训练吞吐量提高了 4.39 倍，训练 GPT 时的训练吞吐量提高了 3.25 倍。 DynaPipe 的源代码可在 https://github.com/awslabs/optimizing-multitask-training-through-dynamic-pipelines 上公开获取。

papers.title: Effective Bug Detection with Unused Definitions.
papers.abstract: Unused definitions are values assigned to variables but not used. Since unused definitions are usually considered redundant code causing no severe consequences except for wasting CPU cycles, system developers usually treat them as mild warnings and simply remove them. In this paper, we reevaluate the effect of unused definitions and discover that some unused definitions could indicate non-trivial bugs like security issues or data corruption, which calls for more attention from developers.
papers.abstract_zh: 未使用的定义是分配给变量但未使用的值。由于未使用的定义通常被认为是冗余代码，除了浪费 CPU 周期之外不会造成严重后果，因此系统开发人员通常将它们视为轻微警告并简单地将其删除。在本文中，我们重新评估了未使用的定义的影响，并发现一些未使用的定义可能表明存在安全问题或数据损坏等重要错误，这需要开发人员给予更多关注。

papers.title: Efficient Auditing of Event-driven Web Applications.
papers.abstract: When a deployer of a web application puts that application on a server (on-prem or cloud), how can they be sure that the application is executing as intended? This paper studies how the deployer can efficiently check that the execution is faithful. We seek mechanisms that: (i) work with web applications that are built with modern event-driven web frameworks, (ii) impose tolerable computation and communication overheads on the web server, and (iii) are complete and sound. We exhibit such a mechanism, based on a new record-replay algorithm. We have implemented our algorithm in Karousos, a system that audits Node.js web applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 当 Web 应用程序的部署者将该应用程序放置在服务器（本地或云）上时，他们如何确保应用程序按预期执行？本文研究部署者如何有效地检查执行是否忠实。我们寻求的机制：(i) 使用使用现代事件驱动的 Web 框架构建的 Web 应用程序，(ii) 在 Web 服务器上施加可容忍的计算和通信开销，以及 (iii) 完整且健全。我们展示了这样一种基于新的记录重放算法的机制。我们已经在 Karousos 中实现了我们的算法，Karousos 是一个审核 Node.js Web 应用程序的系统。

papers.title: Enoki: High Velocity Linux Kernel Scheduler Development.
papers.abstract: Kernel task scheduling is important for application performance, adaptability to new hardware, and complex user requirements. However, developing, testing, and debugging new scheduling algorithms in Linux, the most widely used cloud operating system, is slow and difficult. We developed Enoki, a framework for high velocity development of Linux kernel schedulers. Enoki schedulers are written in safe Rust, and the system supports live upgrade of new scheduling policies into the kernel, userspace debugging, and bidirectional communication with applications. A scheduler implemented with Enoki achieved near identical performance (within 1% on average) to the default Linux scheduler CFS on a wide range of benchmarks. Enoki is also able to support a range of research schedulers, specifically the Shinjuku scheduler, a locality aware scheduler, and the Arachne core arbiter, with good performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 内核任务调度对于应用程序性能、对新硬件的适应性以及复杂的用户需求非常重要。然而，在使用最广泛的云操作系统Linux中开发、测试和调试新的调度算法既缓慢又困难。我们开发了 Enoki，一个用于高速开发 Linux 内核调度程序的框架。 Enoki 调度程序是用安全的 Rust 编写的，系统支持将新的调度策略实时升级到内核、用户空间调试以及与应用程序的双向通信。使用 Enoki 实现的调度程序在各种基准测试中实现了与默认 Linux 调度程序 CFS 几乎相同的性能（平均误差在 1% 以内）。 Enoki 还能够支持一系列研究调度程序，特别是 Shinjuku 调度程序、位置感知调度程序和 Arachne 核心仲裁程序，并且具有良好的性能。

papers.title: Erlang: Application-Aware Autoscaling for Cloud Microservices.
papers.abstract: As cloud applications shift from monoliths to loosely coupled microservices, application developers must decide how many compute resources (e.g., number of replicated containers) to assign to each microservice within an application. This decision affects both (1) the dollar cost to the application developer and (2) the end-to-end latency perceived by the application user. Today, individual microservices are autoscaled independently by adding VMs whenever per-microservice CPU or memory utilization crosses a configurable threshold. However, an application user's end-to-end latency consists of time spent on multiple microservices and each microservice might need a different number of VMs to achieve an overall end-to-end latency.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着云应用程序从整体转向松散耦合的微服务，应用程序开发人员必须决定分配给应用程序中的每个微服务的计算资源（例如，复制容器的数量）。此决定会影响 (1) 应用程序开发人员的美元成本和 (2) 应用程序用户感知的端到端延迟。如今，只要每个微服务的 CPU 或内存利用率超过可配置的阈值，单个微服务就会通过添加虚拟机来独立自动缩放。然而，应用程序用户的端到端延迟由在多个微服务上花费的时间组成，并且每个微服务可能需要不同数量的虚拟机才能实现总体端到端延迟。

papers.title: Exploring Performance and Cost Optimization with ASIC-Based CXL Memory.
papers.abstract: As memory-intensive applications continue to drive the need for advanced architectural solutions, Compute Express Link (CXL) has risen as a promising interconnect technology that enables seamless high-speed, low-latency communication between host processors and various peripheral devices. In this study, we explore the application performance of ASIC CXL memory in various data-center scenarios. We then further explore multiple potential impacts (e.g., throughput, latency, and cost reduction) of employing CXL memory via carefully designed policies and strategies. Our empirical results show the high potential of CXL memory, reveal multiple intriguing observations of CXL memory and contribute to the wide adoption of CXL memory in real-world deployment environments. Based on our benchmarks, we also develop an Abstract Cost Model that can estimate the cost benefit from using CXL memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着内存密集型应用不断推动对高级架构解决方案的需求，Compute Express Link (CXL) 已成为一种有前途的互连技术，可实现主机处理器和各种外围设备之间的无缝高速、低延迟通信。在本研究中，我们探讨了 ASIC CXL 内存在各种数据中心场景中的应用性能。然后，我们通过精心设计的策略和策略进一步探索使用 CXL 内存的多种潜在影响（例如吞吐量、延迟和成本降低）。我们的实证结果显示了 CXL 内存的巨大潜力，揭示了 CXL 内存的多个有趣的观察结果，并有助于 CXL 内存在实际部署环境中的广泛采用。根据我们的基准，我们还开发了一个抽象成本模型，可以估计使用 CXL 内存的成本效益。

papers.title: Exploring the Asynchrony of Slow Memory Filesystem with EasyIO.
papers.abstract: We introduce EasyIO, a new approach to explore asynchronous I/O on filesystems designed for (disaggregated) nonvolatile memories to improve CPU efficiency. EasyIO offloads expensive memory movement operations to the on-chip DMA engine and harvests the unleashed CPU cycles by transparently interleaving asynchronous I/Os with fine-grained application tasks. We further adopt a completion buffer-centric design to improve EasyIO's efficiency and schedulability; internally, orderless file operation and two-level locking are incorporated to break the serial order between file metadata and data, thus accelerating read and write operations and defusing deadlock risks. EasyIO also introduces a traffic-aware channel manager to fulfill the diverse performance goals of applications. Extensive experimental results show that, compared to conventional synchronous filesystems, EasyIO significantly reduces CPU consumption (using less than 88% of cores at most) while achieving comparable peak bandwidth; EasyIO also achieves 1.03-2.3× speedups across eight real-world applications. When achieving these goals, EasyIO exhibits higher but tolerable latencies for read operations due to the task interleaving.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 EasyIO，这是一种探索文件系统上异步 I/O 的新方法，专为（分解的）非易失性存储器而设计，以提高 CPU 效率。 EasyIO 将昂贵的内存移动操作卸载到片上 DMA 引擎，并通过透明地将异步 I/O 与细粒度应用程序任务交错来获取释放的 CPU 周期。我们进一步采用以完成缓冲区为中心的设计来提高EasyIO的效率和可调度性；内部采用无序文件操作和二级锁定，打破文件元数据和数据之间的串行顺序，从而加速读写操作，化解死锁风险。 EasyIO 还引入了流量感知通道管理器来满足应用程序的不同性能目标。大量实验结果表明，与传统同步文件系统相比，EasyIO 显着降低了 CPU 消耗（最多使用不到 88% 的内核），同时实现了可比的峰值带宽； EasyIO 还在八个实际应用程序中实现了 1.03-2.3 倍的加速。在实现这些目标时，由于任务交错，EasyIO 的读取操作表现出较高但可以容忍的延迟。

papers.title: Finding Correctness Bugs in eBPF Verifier with Structured and Sanitized Program.
papers.abstract: eBPF is an inspiring technique in Linux that allows user space processes to extend the kernel by dynamically injecting programs. However, it poses security issues, since the untrusted user code is now executed in the kernel space. eBPF utilizes a verifier to validate the safety of the provided programs, thus its correctness is of paramount importance as attackers may exploit vulnerabilities within it to inject malicious programs. Bug-finding tools like kernel fuzzers currently can detect memory bugs in eBPF system calls, but they experience difficulties in finding correctness bugs in the verifier, e.g., incorrect validations that allow the loading of unsafe programs. Because, unlike detecting memory bugs, where sanitizers can capture such errors once observed, automatically uncovering correctness bugs is very difficult, without an effective test oracle that determines if the verifier behaves correctly for given programs.
papers.abstract_zh: eBPF 是 Linux 中一项鼓舞人心的技术，它允许用户空间进程通过动态注入程序来扩展内核。然而，它会带来安全问题，因为不受信任的用户代码现在是在内核空间中执行的。 eBPF利用验证器来验证所提供程序的安全性，因此其正确性至关重要，因为攻击者可能会利用其中的漏洞注入恶意程序。像内核模糊器这样的错误查找工具目前可以检测 eBPF 系统调用中的内存错误，但它们在查找验证器中的正确性错误时遇到困难，例如允许加载不安全程序的错误验证。因为，与检测内存错误不同，清理程序可以在观察到此类错误后捕获此类错误，而如果没有有效的测试预言机来确定验证程序对于给定程序的行为是否正确，自动发现正确性错误是非常困难的。

papers.title: FLOAT: Federated Learning Optimizations with Automated Tuning.
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a powerful approach that enables collaborative distributed model training without the need for data sharing. However, FL grapples with inherent heterogeneity challenges leading to issues such as stragglers, dropouts, and performance variations. Selection of clients to run an FL instance is crucial, but existing strategies introduce biases and participation issues and do not consider resource efficiency. Communication and training acceleration solutions proposed to increase client participation also fall short due to the dynamic nature of system resources. We address these challenges in this paper by designing FLOAT, a novel framework designed to boost FL client resource awareness. FLOAT optimizes resource utilization dynamically for meeting training deadlines, and mitigates stragglers and dropouts through various optimization techniques; leading to enhanced model convergence and improved performance. FLOAT leverages multi-objective Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) to automate the selection of the optimization techniques and their configurations, tailoring them to individual client resource conditions. Moreover, FLOAT seamlessly integrates into existing FL systems, maintaining non-intrusiveness and versatility for both asynchronous and synchronous FL settings. As per our evaluations, FLOAT increases accuracy by up to 53%, reduces client dropouts by up to 78×, and improves communication, computation, and memory utilization by up to 81×, 44×, and 20× respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 已成为一种强大的方法，无需数据共享即可实现协作分布式模型训练。然而，FL 努力应对固有的异质性挑战，从而导致落后者、辍学和表现变化等问题。选择运行 FL 实例的客户端至关重要，但现有策略引入了偏见和参与问题，并且没有考虑资源效率。由于系统资源的动态特性，为提高客户参与度而提出的通信和培训加速解决方案也存在不足。我们在本文中通过设计 FLOAT 来解决这些挑战，这是一个旨在提高 FL 客户端资源意识的新颖框架。 FLOAT 动态优化资源利用率以满足训练期限，并通过各种优化技术减少落后者和辍学者；从而增强模型收敛性并提高性能。 FLOAT 利用带有人工反馈的多目标强化学习 (RLHF) 来自动选择优化技术及其配置，并根据各个客户的资源条件进行定制。此外，FLOAT 无缝集成到现有 FL 系统中，保持异步和同步 FL 设置的非侵入性和多功能性。根据我们的评估，FLOAT 将准确率提高了 53%，将客户端丢失率降低了 78 倍，并将通信、计算和内存利用率分别提高了 81 倍、44 倍和 20 倍。

papers.title: FLOWS: Balanced MRC Profiling for Heterogeneous Object-Size Cache.
papers.abstract: While Miss Ratio Curve (MRC) profiling methods based on spatial sampling are effective in modeling cache behaviors, previous MRC studies lack in-depth analysis of profiling errors and primarily target homogeneous object-size scenarios. This has caused imbalanced errors of existing MRC approaches when employed in heterogeneous object-size caches. For instance, in CDN traces, the error of the Byte Miss Ratio Curve (BMRC) could be two orders of magnitude larger than that of the Object Miss Ratio Curve (OMRC).
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然基于空间采样的未命中率曲线 (MRC) 分析方法可以有效地对缓存行为进行建模，但之前的 MRC 研究缺乏对分析错误的深入分析，并且主要针对同质对象大小场景。当现有 MRC 方法应用于异构对象大小缓存时，这会导致不平衡错误。例如，在 CDN 跟踪中，字节丢失率曲线 (BMRC) 的误差可能比对象丢失率曲线 (OMRC) 的误差大两个数量级。

papers.title: GMorph: Accelerating Multi-DNN Inference via Model Fusion.
papers.abstract: AI-powered applications often involve multiple deep neural network (DNN)-based prediction tasks to support application-level functionalities. However, executing multi-DNNs can be challenging due to the high resource demands and computation costs that increase linearly with the number of DNNs. Multi-task learning (MTL) addresses this problem by designing a multi-task model that shares parameters across tasks based on a single backbone DNN. This paper explores an alternative approach called model fusion: rather than training a single multi-task model from scratch as MTL does, model fusion fuses multiple task-specific DNNs that are pre-trained separately and can have heterogeneous architectures into a single multi-task model. We materialize model fusion in a software framework called GMorph to accelerate multi-DNN inference while maintaining task accuracy. GMorph features three main technical contributions: graph mutations to fuse multi-DNNs into resource-efficient multi-task models, search-space sampling algorithms, and predictive filtering to reduce the high search costs. Our experiments show that GMorph can outperform MTL baselines and reduce the inference latency of multi-DNNs by 1.1-3× while meeting the target task accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: AI 支持的应用程序通常涉及多个基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的预测任务，以支持应用程序级功能。然而，由于资源需求和计算成本随着 DNN 数量的增加而线性增加，执行多个 DNN 可能具有挑战性。多任务学习 (MTL) 通过设计一个多任务模型来解决这个问题，该模型基于单个骨干 DNN 跨任务共享参数。本文探索了一种称为模型融合的替代方法：模型融合不像 MTL 那样从头开始训练单个多任务模型，而是将多个单独预训练且可以具有异构架构的特定于任务的 DNN 融合到单个多任务模型中。我们在名为 GMorph 的软件框架中实现模型融合，以加速多 DNN 推理，同时保持任务准确性。 GMorph 具有三个主要技术贡献：将多个 DNN 融合到资源高效的多任务模型中的图突变、搜索空间采样算法以及用于降低高搜索成本的预测过滤。我们的实验表明，GMorph 可以超越 MTL 基线，并将多 DNN 的推理延迟降低 1.1-3 倍，同时满足目标任务精度。

papers.title: Halflife: An Adaptive Flowlet-based Load Balancer with Fading Timeout in Data Center Networks.
papers.abstract: Modern data centers (DCs) employ various traffic load balancers to achieve high bisection bandwidth. Among them, flowlet switching has shown remarkable performance in both load balancing and upper-layer protocol (e.g., TCP) friendliness. However, flowlet-based load balancers suffer from the inflexibility of flowlet timeout value (FTV) and result in sub-optimal performance under various application workloads. To this end, we propose Halflife, a novel flowlet-based load balancer that leverages fading FTVs to reroute traffic promptly under different workloads without any prior knowledge. Halflife not only balances traffic better, but also avoids the performance degradation caused by frequent oscillation or shifting of lows between paths. Furthermore, Halflife's fading mechanism is not only compatible with most flowlet-based load balancers, such as CONGA and LetFlow, but also improves their performance when leveraging flowlet switching in RDMA network. Through testbed experiments and simulations, we prove that Halflife improves the performance of CONGA and LetFlow by 10% ~ 150%, and it outperforms other load balancers by 30% ~ 200% across most application workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心 (DC) 采用各种流量负载平衡器来实现高平分带宽。其中，Flowlet交换在负载均衡和上层协议（例如TCP）友好性方面都表现出了出色的性能。然而，基于 Flowlet 的负载均衡器受到 Flowlet 超时值 (FTV) 不灵活性的影响，并导致在各种应用程序工作负载下性能不佳。为此，我们提出了 Halflife，这是一种基于 Flowlet 的新型负载均衡器，它利用衰落 FTV 在不同工作负载下迅速重新路由流量，而无需任何先验知识。 Halflife不仅可以更好地平衡流量，还可以避免路径之间频繁振荡或低点移动导致的性能下降。此外，Halflife 的衰落机制不仅与大多数基于 Flowlet 的负载均衡器（例如 CONGA 和 LetFlow）兼容，而且还提高了它们在 RDMA 网络中利用 Flowlet 交换时的性能。通过测试床实验和模拟，我们证明Halflife将CONGA和LetFlow的性能提高了10% ~ 150%，并且在大多数应用程序工作负载上比其他负载均衡器性能高出30% ~ 200%。

papers.title: HAP: SPMD DNN Training on Heterogeneous GPU Clusters with Automated Program Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Single-Program-Multiple-Data (SPMD) parallelism has recently been adopted to train large deep neural networks (DNNs). Few studies have explored its applicability on heterogeneous clusters, to fully exploit available resources for large model learning. This paper presents HAP, an automated system designed to expedite SPMD DNN training on heterogeneous clusters. HAP jointly optimizes the tensor sharding strategy, sharding ratios across heterogeneous devices and the communication methods for tensor exchanges for optimized distributed training with SPMD parallelism. We novelly formulate model partitioning as a program synthesis problem, in which we generate a distributed program from scratch on a distributed instruction set that semantically resembles the program designed for a single device, and systematically explore the solution space with an A-based search algorithm. We derive the optimal tensor sharding ratios by formulating it as a linear programming problem. Additionally, HAP explores tensor communication optimization in a heterogeneous cluster and integrates it as part of the program synthesis process, for automatically choosing optimal collective communication primitives and applying sufficient factor broadcasting technique. Extensive experiments on representative workloads demonstrate that HAP achieves up to 2.41x speed-up on heterogeneous clusters.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近采用单程序多数据（SPMD）并行性来训练大型深度神经网络（DNN）。很少有研究探索其在异构集群上的适用性，以充分利用可用资源进行大型模型学习。本文介绍了 HAP，这是一种自动化系统，旨在加速异构集群上的 SPMD DNN 训练。 HAP 联合优化张量分片策略、跨异构设备的分片比率以及张量交换的通信方法，以通过 SPMD 并行性优化分布式训练。我们新颖地将模型分区表述为程序综合问题，其中我们在分布式指令集上从头开始生成分布式程序，其语义类似于为单个设备设计的程序，并使用基于 A 的搜索算法系统地探索解决方案空间。我们通过将其表述为线性规划问题来导出最佳张量分片比率。此外，HAP探索异构集群中的张量通信优化，并将其集成为程序合成过程的一部分，用于自动选择最佳集体通信原语并应用充分因子广播技术。对代表性工作负载的大量实验表明，HAP 在异构集群上实现了高达 2.41 倍的加速。

papers.title: HD-IOV: SW-HW Co-designed I/O Virtualization with Scalability and Flexibility for Hyper-Density Cloud.
papers.abstract: As the resource density of cloud servers increases, cloud providers deploy hundreds of VMs concurrently on a single server, requiring a high-performance, scalable, flexible and high-density I/O virtualization method. Hardware assisted virtualization such as device pass-through with SR-IOV can achieve near-native performance, however, at the expense of flexibility and a limited device count. Traditional software-based I/O virtualization systems tend to dedicate additional computing cores for higher performance, but suffer from critical scalability problems especially in high-density cloud.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着云服务器资源密度的增加，云提供商在单台服务器上同时部署数百个虚拟机，需要高性能、可扩展、灵活的高密度I/O虚拟化方法。硬件辅助虚拟化（例如使用 SR-IOV 的设备直通）可以实现接近本机的性能，但代价是灵活性和有限的设备数量。传统的基于软件的 I/O 虚拟化系统往往会专门使用额外的计算核心来获得更高的性能，但会遇到关键的可扩展性问题，尤其是在高密度云中。

papers.title: Hoda: a High-performance Open vSwitch Dataplane with Multiple Specialized Data Paths.
papers.abstract: Open vSwitch (OvS) has been widely used in cloud networks in view of its programmability and flexibility. However, we observe a huge performance drop when it loads practical cloud networking services (e.g., tunneling and firewalling). Our further analysis reveals that the root cause lies in the gap between the needs of supporting various selections of packet header fields and the one-size-fits-all data path in the vanilla OvS. Motivated by this, we design Hoda, a high-performance OvS dataplane with multiple specialized data paths. Specifically, Hoda constructs the specialized parser and microflow cache for each OpenFlow program so as to achieve lightweight parsing and caching. We also propose a configurable version of Hoda that introduces configuration knobs in the data path to ease specialization.
